Polling shows Steve is TRAILING in the critical Montana Senate race that WILL determine the majority.

I will not stop fighting to make sure Steve WINS, but I need to know you’re in this fight too. Everything is on the line this election. The Senate majority AND all the America First progress we’ve made.

We cannot allow Steve to lose. Political pundits think the Democrats are a lock to win the Senate in November. **[Help me show them it’s NOT OVER by supporting Steve Daines for Senate RIGHT NOW.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=e48676f20afe40a9bdd82068a2224230&_e=lo6Z4mWz_lw4b_jv5s9WElCHPq50KwbeU2C-am__LfbJGG3Kg6rP6i_J8MEZv2b7YGdQoZC0w56k7xgvl8zgLRJ493CMPSkQPfUcXJvKAoPsERL5d-JCkzAC5ZqmK_8O9UxxgTrlnf-rua439l2SYi1cPM_BTNI22HMYl1_7eT0goa1AYqBtlzZoFt4m9WliUJ63awYhlhlXIRmVT57fVajrpNRfrbP9P4DcMjcKhm0CfZG9b0VDvvz-mGttimYA-aYOBQNFSxAACibHe3l-0lwaoIRSK1Aq5QRY6_BfKkpF2efSWFDyvBxbkDodB3otrFAz9jnbU11mv-Ve-6LwuSv5IujvDp1-M6IMhBZmTj2WDU6JsyqIJ1L4UAzGFlLl0p8CWfk_iK5oUF8UXtJe2a01txBar-mzoT6h-KCAEEfX6cL5K6sM2dnH_Ae6CCba)**

name: Team Warner
subject: That's all, folks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark Warner just finished his final U.S. Senate debate against his GOP opponent in Richmond.
|
---

| | Derek --

Mark Warner just finished his final U.S. Senate debate against his GOP opponent in Richmond. As we've seen in the previous two debates, Mark's plan to trust the science when it comes to a coronavirus vaccine, address transparency and accountability in our criminal justice system with the _Justice in Policing Act,_ and ensure Virginians succeed in our new tech-driven economy shows there's a clear choice in who should be representing Virginia in the Senate: Mark Warner.

We've seen Mark's opponent's positions on the issues:
* He's compared giving health care to 400,000 Virginians to giving a child a cookie.
* He's said Trump has shown "great leadership" in handling the pandemic.
* He's called masks "tyranny."
* Just a couple weeks ago he was in the audience of a potential super-spreader rally blowing Trump kisses.

... and the list goes on.

We have the opportunity to protect the progress we've made in the Commonwealth and keep Virginia headed toward a brighter future, and Mark's opponent has proven that he just doesn't have what it takes. [**If you have the means, can you make a contribution towards Mark 's re-election campaign and send him back to the Senate to work for _every_ Virginian?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da58/53d9897e/555d6a1c/1c88f4a9/562573709/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-finaldebate?refcode=20201013_f_3_nd__873__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5") There are just 21 days until Election Day on November 3rd. We simply can't afford to lose momentum -- there's too much at stake for Virginians.

Thanks for your support!

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da58/53d9897e/555d6a1c/1c88f4a8/562573709/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-finaldebate?refcode=20201013_f_3_nd__873__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---
|

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Early Voting Begins Tomorrow
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-jj/) October 13, 2020 **Countdown To Early Voting** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-r/) Early voting starts tomorrow, and #TeamHagerty is ready to support Republicans up and down the ballot. Bill is traveling across the state, from Memphis to Mountain City, listening to Tennesseans about what's important to us. Tennesseans want to send strong conservatives to Washington this November because conservative values are Tennessee values. **It's Time To Confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-y/) As the Senate holds hearings on Judge Amy Coney Barrett's nomination to the Supreme Court, Bill Hagerty has been outspoken calling for the Republican Senate Majority to fill the seat. Judge Barrett is a principled constitutionalist who will interpret the law NOT make it. We need to confirm more constitutionalist judges and justices to the federal bench, and Bill will work to make sure that's the case. Sign the petition confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-j/) **Looking To November** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to make America a socialist country.
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-t/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-i/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-d/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[The Daily Times:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-h/) Q&A with U.S. Senate candidate Bill Hagerty****[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-k/) U.S. Senate Candidate Bill Hagerty Discusses Tennesseans' Deep Concerns and How We Can Run Up the Popular Vote for Trump****[WKRN:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-u/) Williamson County GOP holds 'Rally 4 Freedom' in downtown Franklin****[WBBJ:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-o/) Bill Hagerty discuss concerns for COVID-19, campaign goals**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-b/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-m/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-c/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-f/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrjhjl-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_

clean_body: #TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox No images? October 13, 2020 Countdown To Early Voting Early voting starts tomorrow, and #TeamHagerty is ready to support Republicans up and down the ballot. Bill is traveling across the state, from Memphis to Mountain City, listening to Tennesseans about what's important to us. Tennesseans want to send strong conservatives to Washington this November because conservative values are Tennessee values. It's Time To Confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett As the Senate holds hearings on Judge Amy Coney Barrett's nomination to the Supreme Court, Bill Hagerty has been outspoken calling for the Republican Senate Majority to fill the seat. Judge Barrett is a principled constitutionalist who will interpret the law NOT make it. We need to confirm more constitutionalist judges and justices to the federal bench, and Bill will work to make sure that's the case. Sign the petition confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett Looking To November We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to make America a socialist country. Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty Press Highlights Q&A with U.S. Senate candidate Bill Hagerty U.S. Senate Candidate Bill Hagerty Discusses Tennesseans' Deep Concerns and How We Can Run Up the Popular Vote for Trump Williamson County GOP holds 'Rally 4 Freedom' in downtown Franklin Bill Hagerty discuss concerns for COVID-19, campaign goals What They're Saying... "Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!" " TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" " I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." " Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." " Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families." " Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man." " Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative." " Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground." " Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!" " We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud." " We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty." " I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty." " Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County." " You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_ | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Team Hagerty P.O. Box 150748 Nashville, TN 37215 |

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett
body:
Peter,I wanted to make sure you saw my latest op-ed highlighting the need to fill the Supreme Court seat and confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett. One of the most important duties of the United States Senate is to provide advice and consent and ultimately decide whether to confirm a Supreme Court justice. Our judicial branch is vitally important to our federal government's ecosystem - our judges and justices must be impartial and stalwart interpreters of the United States Constitution. **Read my full op-ed in _The Jackson Sun_ __[ HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrddtt-fuutjhhtj-r/)**No one is more qualified to serve on the Supreme Court bench than Judge Amy Coney Barrett. She is a dedicated public servant -- a solid constitutionalist, who will steadfastly serve our nation. In the Senate, I will continue to stand with President Trump and Senator Blackburn to confirm constitutional judges and justices who respect the Constitution and rule of law.Best,Bill Hagerty
Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrddtt-fuutjhhtj-y/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrddtt-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrddtt-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjrddtt-fuutjhhtj-i/)
---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
4515 Harding Pike
Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205

I've told you before, but I have to say it just one more time -- Mark Warner ONLY won by 16,727 votes the last time he faced an election after OUTRAISING Gillespie by $9 million. When I call our Finance Director at 9:30 tonight, I want to be able to say we've closed the fundraising gap to WIN BACK those 16,727 votes in these final three weeks. That's why I've secured an unprecedented 5X-MATCH for the next HOUR upon hitting the halfway point of our goal. Thank you for all of your support. \- Daniel Gade Sent from my iPhone 7330 Staples Mill Rd., #100, Richmond, VA 23228 Daniel Gade is a retired member of the United States Army. body:
Friends, Tonight is our FINAL FEC DEADLINE before the Election. Last week, Roll Call named Max Rose the third most likely incumbent to lose his election this November. That’s exactly why Nancy Pelosi and her dark money allies are dropping millions into our district in the final stretch to try and buy this seat for Max Rose.

| | **Friends-

** Tonight is our FINAL FEC DEADLINE before the Election.

Last week, Roll Call named Max Rose the third most likely incumbent to lose his election this November. That’s exactly why Nancy Pelosi and her dark money allies are dropping millions into our district in the final stretch to try and buy this seat for Max Rose.

This is a crucial moment for our campaign. Everyone from President Trump to even Nancy Pelosi will be closely watching our fundraising report.

If we can fill our budget gap, we’ll have the resources to stop the nasty lies and WIN this election. But we’re $25,820 short from our goal.

If we keep the momentum going and send a message that Staten Island and Southern Brooklyn can’t be bought by dark money, Nancy Pelosi and her allies will be left with no choice but to redirect their resources elsewhere.

[We have to send a STRONG message TONIGHT. Can I count you in?](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=343A530A1A7201)

name: Mary Mancini, TNDP Chair
subject: Democracy in Action: Early Voting Starts Today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
http://www.tndp.org [http://www.tndp.org]
Dear Peter,
Today is the FIRST day of EARLY VOTING in Tennessee!
EARLY VOTING is EASY , QUICK , and g ives you the most FLEXIBILTY for your schedule.
⏰ EARLY VOTING Times & locations differ in each county. Doublecheck your early vote locations in your county at tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup [http://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup] .
📝 MAKE YOUR PLAN to VOTE NOW!
1. DOUBLECHECK YOUR VOTER REGISTRATION STATUS at tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup [http://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup]
2. CHECK YOUR EARLY VOTING AND ELECTION DAY POLLING LOCATION & HOURS at tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup [http://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup]
3. MAKE SURE YOU BRING A PHOTO ID.
Find out what kind of ID you can use here [https://sos.tn.gov/products/elections/what-id-required-when-voting]
.
4. PICK A DAY AND TIME, DECIDE HOW YOU'LL GET TO THE POLLS, AND GO VOTE! GET EXCITED . Tennessee has more registered voters than ever before - over 4.4 million for this election! You, your friends, and your neighbors are all voting because they know we're on track to pick up more General Assembly seats and, for the first time, send a Black woman to the U.S. Senate [https://www.marquitabradshaw.com/] ! Here's how you drum up excitement, in three easy steps:

1. DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATES: Visit TNDP.org for a list of all Democrats on the ballot. Donate, share their content on social media, display their yard signs, and talk them up to friends and family! [https://tndp.org/2020-democratic-candidates/?emci=ea607c28-6fc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=c29b1a77-77c0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=6371147]

2. TAKE PICTURES: When you Vote Early, take a photo and tag @tndp on Twitter or @tndem on Facebook. We WILL post your photos!

3. MEME THE VOTE: Everyone loves memes! We'll be posting Early Voting memes and you should definitely share them. If you find good voting memes (or make them yourself), share those with us too so we can amplify. [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/photos/a.10150148030080831/10158378655320831/]

PROTECT THE VOTE. So many people are voting this year and we want to make sure that every vote is counted! Help us by joining the TNDP Voter Protection Team:

Sign up to join our Voter Protection Volunteer Hotline: Here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/uz-6HfqMf028C9Jfrw4TZw2]
Become an Early Voting Poll Watcher: Here[https://secure.ngpvan.com/tZqcMWPBdEO9dFfxk7rYZw2]

PROBLEMS? Call the TNDP voter protection team at 855-4VOTETN (855-486-8386).
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Problems%20Voting_.%20%281%29.png]

Thank you for voting!
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]

PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20298307/256438595/-940294256?refcode=101420-es-morning-joe-match-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWM0N2E1MS0yODBlLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0rQ2PfSKFkzqrY_chZx5n2TR-dZpk8-HYkqaOFuvag8=&emci=706de5fc-270e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=9ec47a51-280e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)

Do you know why I was on Morning Joe just a few minutes ago, friend? According to the latest polling numbers, I’m in a dead heat against my opponent, seven-term incumbent Vern Buchanan and we have a real chance to flip Florida’s 16th Congressional District from red to blue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20298308/256438596/2025614833?refcode2=9ec47a51-280e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=706de5fc-270e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=9ec47a51-280e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=101420-es-morning-joe-match-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWM0N2E1MS0yODBlLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0rQ2PfSKFkzqrY_chZx5n2TR-dZpk8-HYkqaOFuvag8=)
We are in a position to win this race because of you. Grassroots supporters like you have carried our campaign this far, and with less than three weeks left to go, I need you to step up again.

**And there’s no better time to donate than right now after a group of supporters just announced that they will be matching every contribution made to our campaign from now until Sunday!**

**[That means your donation has TWICE THE IMPACT right now and gives us the boost our campaign needs to compete in the final weeks leading up to Election Day — but only if I can count on you to take advantage of this special opportunity.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20298310/256438598/2025614833?refcode2=9ec47a51-280e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=706de5fc-270e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=9ec47a51-280e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=101420-es-morning-joe-match-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWM0N2E1MS0yODBlLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0rQ2PfSKFkzqrY_chZx5n2TR-dZpk8-HYkqaOFuvag8=)**

The stakes couldn’t be higher in this election. We can act as a check on Trump contesting a legitimate election.

Not only that, we can create positive change: >From recovering from the pandemic, and building back our economy stronger than ever before, to protecting our land and water, and delivering accountability to Washington — I am ready to do the work.

That’s why I’m running for Congress, and why I’m in a statistical tie against seven-term incumbent Vern Buchanan. The people of the Suncoast and our nation want real change, and we can deliver it, together.

I’m grateful for your support.

Margaret

Grassroots supporters like you have carried our campaign this far, and with less than three weeks left to go, I need you to step up again. And there’s no better time to donate than right now after a group of supporters just announced that they will be matching every contribution made to our campaign from now until Sunday! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = The stakes couldn’t be higher in this election. Not only that, we can create positive change: >From recovering from the pandemic, and building back our economy stronger than ever before, to protecting our land and water, and delivering accountability to Washington — I am ready to do the work. That’s why I’m running for Congress, and why I’m in a statistical tie against seven-term incumbent Vern Buchanan. The people of the Suncoast and our nation want real change, and we can deliver it, together. I’m grateful for your support. Margaret PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. body:
The Texas GOP corruption problem doesn’t end with the fraud indictment on AG Ken Paxton. Pete Sessions has his own ethics issues, and he wants back into the cult of corruption. Here are just a few of his “greatest hits”:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20299695/256444602/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201014corruption1_TK_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjM3MWE2Yi0yZDBlLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HlrjarFiGTN00GlNbZ_lHJdeKfg0c-C4rR0qrWTqyLo=)
---

Hey folks, The Texas GOP corruption problem doesn’t end with the fraud indictment on AG Ken Paxton. Pete Sessions has his own ethics issues, and he wants back into the cult of corruption. Here are just a few of his “greatest hits”:
1. He used campaign funds to pay for a private golf club membership in Maryland.
2. He voted to allow himself to use taxpayer money for private air travel (and then voted to restrict protections for whistleblowers who reported this behavior).
3. He missed his own swearing-in ceremony to attend a fundraiser.
4. He voted against ethics training for members of Congress.
5. He voted to cut the budget of the Office of Congressional Ethics.

The list goes on... and on. **Oh, we forgot to mention that he was caught up in Rudy Giuliani’s scheme to funnel millions of dollars of illegal Russian money to GOP campaigns.** Republican or Democrat, Texans around the state believe in decency, morality, and transparency. And we know it’s our duty to elect Rick Kennedy on November 3. [_**There’s too much on the line to sit out. clean_body: The Texas GOP corruption problem doesn’t end with the fraud indictment on AG Ken Paxton. Pete Sessions has his own ethics issues, and he wants back into the cult of corruption. Here are just a few of his “greatest hits”: | = Hey folks, The Texas GOP corruption problem doesn’t end with the fraud indictment on AG Ken Paxton. Pete Sessions has his own ethics issues, and he wants back into the cult of corruption. Here are just a few of his “greatest hits”: 1. He used campaign funds to pay for a private golf club membership in Maryland. 2. He voted to allow himself to use taxpayer money for private air travel (and then voted to restrict protections for whistleblowers who reported this behavior). 3. He missed his own swearing-in ceremony to attend a fundraiser. 4. He voted against ethics training for members of Congress. 5. He voted to cut the budget of the Office of Congressional Ethics. The list goes on... and on. Oh, we forgot to mention that he was caught up in Rudy Giuliani’s scheme to funnel millions of dollars of illegal Russian money to GOP campaigns. Republican or Democrat, Texans around the state believe in decency, morality, and transparency. And we know it’s our duty to elect Rick Kennedy on November 3. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Kennedy | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

If the House could decide our next President, don 't you want to do everything possible to make sure Trump's allies are in the majority? Our President 's legacy is on the line. Your support could save it. By rushing your 600% match to fund key battleground races, you're not just helping determine the outcome of the House, you could be determining the outcome of our PRESIDENT. I cannot stress how high the stakes are for taking back the House. If you have ANY DESIRE to help President Trump win you CANNOT hold back. Thank you, Kevin McCarthy Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Mike Braun
subject: personal note
body:
Why you sent me to the US Senate No images? [Click here](https://mbfi.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xjlkiud-vkreeut-j/) Peter,Yesterday I had one of the greatest honors of my life: introducing fellow Hoosier and Supreme Court nominee Amy Coney Barrett before the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee. [click here to watch my remarks](https://mbfi.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjlkiud-vkreeut-r/)For those of us who believe in protecting the sanctity of life, the right to bear arms, the free press, the right to free speech, and most importantly defending our Constitution, this is a big week. I can assure you Amy Coney Barrett will be a dedicated Justice committed to upholding our Constitution. This is why you elected me to the Senate and I look forward to voting to confirm Amy Coney Barrett later this month.Thank you for being part of our team. \- MikeMike Braun
US Senator [Support Today](https://mbfi.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xjlkiud-vkreeut-y/) MIKE BRAUN FOR INDIANA
PO BOX 159
ZIONSVILLE, IN 460777 [Unsubscribe](https://mbfi.cmail19.com/t/t-u-xjlkiud-vkreeut-t/)

name: Matt's iPhone
subject: Tomorrow at midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | Peter,
I wanted to reach out to you because of an important deadline coming up tomorrow at midnight. My team has been digging through the numbers, and the Democrats have been consistently outraising us in 2020.
Now that we're less than 3 weeks from Election Day, we need to get battle-ready!
That's why I'm asking that you DONATE TODAY so that we can take on the Democrats' radical policies and their divisive politics that have left too many Americans behind.
You can click here and donate through this secure link: https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/deadline-approaching-o
It's Patriots like you who keep our campaign running. I swore off corporate PAC money, so I only take contributions from the people I serve!
Thanks, and let's go out and win this thing in 2020!
-Matt
Sent from my iPhone. Please excuse any brevity and typos.

name: Betsy
subject: Double your donation today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Peter, Today is our final big fundraising report deadline before the election. And now is when we have to pay the bills for our final communications to voters. Election day 2020 is almost here and we need to close strong! Fortunately we have help** from a great supporter who is offering to match donations up to $1,000 today only, to help us hit our goal! ** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5rlVnMNxa2-CHRSRlebxU5unw0S2TUMKBSydBvL0yig=/T7dXHQTbmbEC7OCuNrkGLa5Fk1gRRcUqfW8sjioronQ=?refcode=10.14) A barrage of t.v. attack ads show that my opponent knows I can win this race, but the attacks also have required additional communication with voters to spread the truth. Ohio deserves better than politics as usual and we're getting a new t.v. ad up to communicate that message! **But that means we need to raise a lot more money before our deadline tonight**. That's why I need your support today. **[If you can donate $15 today, we 'll double your donation; you help us meet our goal; and together we fight these attacks.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5rlVnMNxa2-CHRSRlebxU5unw0S2TUMKBSydBvL0yig=/8vh0pYq8HB5hHaYkW4Br9RfyQqeFp_dcUPZyPkKcP0E=?refcode=10.14&amount=15)** Thanks so much for your support, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5rlVnMNxa2-CHRSRlebxU5unw0S2TUMKBSydBvL0yig=/T7dXHQTbmbEC7OCuNrkGLa5Fk1gRRcUqfW8sjioronQ=?refcode=10.14&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5rlVnMNxa2-CHRSRlebxU5unw0S2TUMKBSydBvL0yig=/T7dXHQTbmbEC7OCuNrkGLa5Fk1gRRcUqfW8sjioronQ=?refcode=10.14&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5rlVnMNxa2-CHRSRlebxU5unw0S2TUMKBSydBvL0yig=/T7dXHQTbmbEC7OCuNrkGLa5Fk1gRRcUqfW8sjioronQ=?refcode=10.14&amount=25) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5rlVnMNxa2-CHRSRlebxU5unw0S2TUMKBSydBvL0yig=/T7dXHQTbmbEC7OCuNrkGLa5Fk1gRRcUqfW8sjioronQ=?refcode=10.14&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5rlVnMNxa2-CHRSRlebxU5unw0S2TUMKBSydBvL0yig=/T7dXHQTbmbEC7OCuNrkGLa5Fk1gRRcUqfW8sjioronQ=?refcode=10.14)

Friend,

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz' Power Gets Settled in Three Weeks
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_them_pay_retarg&n=1)
---
Peter \-- The radical, anti-American Democrats in the MN House FAILED you for the seventh, and last, time! When they refused to allow a clean vote on the End Walz Powers Resolution on Monday, they left us with only one option:
### Settle Things on November 3rd!
We're no longer encouraging you to contact your legislator and tell them to vote the right way. These Democrats have failed you. They refused to join five other Democrats and all Republicans with a little common sense. Now it's time to make them pay for voting against our liberties. The election is only three weeks away. Action 4 Liberty will be spending time, money and treasure over the next three weeks in these targeted districts, informing voters of what they did. **"Politician Brad Tabke voted against opening our economy seven times."** **"John Persell has Governor Walz' back, but not yours."** **"You can't count on Dan Wolgamott protecting your rights in St Paul."** Peter, we are going to take this message to tens of thousands of voters in targeted districts from now until November 3rd. This will cost a lot of money, but that's what is needed to win this battle. Can I count on you for support? | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_them_pay_retarg&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_them_pay_retarg&n=3)
---
I know a lot of candidates and organizations are asking you for money right now. But I can assure you that your donation to Action 4 Liberty will ABSOLUTELY deliver results on November 3rd.
We know exactly which districts to target, who is the most vulnerable and using our model, can spend money more effectively than others. Your donation will change the dynamics of politics in this state.
**You've been there for us when we asked you to contact legislators. And that work led to five Democrats joining us (think how hard that was to accomplish!).**
Unfortunately, the remaining targeted Democrats failed us and now we have to sort things out at the ballot box. It's time to make them pay!
## [Yes, I want to Make Them Pay!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_them_pay_retarg&n=4)
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S.****[Please help us make these Democrats pay for voting against our liberty. Pitch in $100 if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or for max pain, donate $1,000.](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_them_pay_retarg&n=5)**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_them_pay_retarg&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_them_pay_retarg&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_them_pay_retarg&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Rep. Jim Jordan
subject: What's stopping you from endorsing me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
It's Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56578012:s4FVPEKyN:m:1:2247059263:2BD03F66697D24D8559EB52A1EC38A99:r)
---

Peter,

Like you, my team and I are having to adapt to the present reality of things, which includes altering campaign related activities and fundraising events.

With the absence of campaign rallies, door-knocking, and in-person voter outreach efforts, now more than ever it's important to activate our online support community.

**[That's why today I'm asking you- as one of the most valued members of the American conservative movement - to personally endorse my re-election campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56578012:s4FVPEKyN:m:1:2247059263:2BD03F66697D24D8559EB52A1EC38A99:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56578012:s4FVPEKyN:m:1:2247059263:2BD03F66697D24D8559EB52A1EC38A99:r)
As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, Democrats have long targeted me for electoral defeat in November's election. They don't like debating with me with regard to important legislation in the House; and **they cannot stand how we're helping the American public come to the realization that Democratic leadership in Congress is more focused on partisanship than getting things done for the American people**.

So, if you agree with me that:
1. **We need to secure the southern border**
2. **We should defund sanctuary cities**
3. **All life is sacred and should be protected at all costs**

**[Please consider endorsing my campaign for re-election today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56578012:s4FVPEKyN:m:1:2247059263:2BD03F66697D24D8559EB52A1EC38A99:r)**

**[Your endorsement today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56578012:s4FVPEKyN:m:1:2247059263:2BD03F66697D24D8559EB52A1EC38A99:r)** will serve me well as my team and I continue to implement President Trump's America Agenda.

For liberty,
Jim Jordan

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56578012:s4FVPEKyN:m:1:2247059263:2BD03F66697D24D8559EB52A1EC38A99:r)

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

You were added to the system April 25, 2020.

subject: A few bucks goes a long way
body:
We sent you an email last night stressing the importance of tonight’s big deadline. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f5b719340039/a-few-bucks-goes-a-long-way?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
We sent you an email last night stressing the importance of tonight’s big deadline. But I just got off the phone with my Finance Director, and she said we need $9,000 more by midnight tonight.

**That might sound like a big number, but if each person who opened this email chipped in just $9, we would shoot past that goal within an hour. **

__[Click here to chip in $9 and help us meet our goal.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=1dc881e4bf&e=140a9b81e7)__

This is a rural and exurban district. The cost of running a strong campaign is fairly inexpensive here compared to more urban districts. I also don’t take any dirty money from corporate PACs and special interest groups - so while your contribution may be just a drop in the bucket for some campaigns, it makes a huge difference here. Your investment will go a long way in my campaign, and towards our victory in November.

[Can I count on you to donate $9 to flip IL16 from red to blue?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c72ff568e4&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Dean Browning, Chairman
subject: Sign a Petition TODAY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CSSPAC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Dear Patriot,
Thank you for recently joining our team at Common Sense Solutions. Right now, we are in a tough fight to preserve our values and fundamental freedoms as Americans. We are currently gathering signatures from thousands of Americans for SEVEN critical petitions. I urge you to find the issue most important to you and sign it, so your voice is heard, or sign them all if you feel, as we do, that they are ALL important! Petition to Re-open PA
As responsible citizens, we did our part to "flatten the curve" and slow the spread of COVID-19. Now that has been accomplished and the virus has been PROVEN not to be as deadly as officials once thought, we need to re-open Pennsylvania. The Democrats have weaponized this pandemic to crush the economy and destroy the middle class! Will you sign this petition today? We will hand-deliver these petitions to the Governor's office!
[CLICK HERE TO SIGN NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PbLdXAdC1-gVbJTmSErK7AMIaw4vslGl1K7TiiaC44kHTicBaSC6hZV9eDBW-slICA3QnuOutqWYwaAGYvPPveLtfmHoUcQZxhj2bW_bkXwWn9KRMn3n_at-Lu4gOgnpgFAhp0Fxh_uiLq4-tjKj5LWiFscUWxn4ErTIclQx38BNcI_VZcHm4Q==&c=nfbaY9KnTmHJgbuOzHMFBI2ZQQtORYvvPv9brdSZouT1v1m_XT6xuw==&ch=ubWvaiXm4LiaVQKOI-DhVouOtsfdgrwq-Z59hMrPWmXgjYZPBJNYWQ==) Petition to Back the Blue
At a time when ANTIFA, Black Lives Matter and Joe Biden push to get rid of the police forces that defend our families and protect our communities, we need to Back the Blue more than ever! We want to show Joe Biden and the Radical Left Mob that their idea of chaos and anarchy is NOT welcome in our neighborhoods! Will you sign this petition to show your support for local police forces across Pennsylvania?
[CLICK HERE TO SIGN NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PbLdXAdC1-gVbJTmSErK7AMIaw4vslGl1K7TiiaC44kHTicBaSC6hZV9eDBW-slIIIqO5FgP-06pBTTMj0RrX6PEhlsQRbE-biBsomMOyXle2iWp0nrYpCbImmbrgFIOUsQEdmYxHlsISccMvQALwVkzR4ktzADgJrLCi_tMsYQ=&c=nfbaY9KnTmHJgbuOzHMFBI2ZQQtORYvvPv9brdSZouT1v1m_XT6xuw==&ch=ubWvaiXm4LiaVQKOI-DhVouOtsfdgrwq-Z59hMrPWmXgjYZPBJNYWQ==)
Petition to Defend American Values & Freedom
As Americans, we must defend our rights given to us by God. If you're like us, you love your family, your community, and the American way of life! But the Radical Left has made it clear: They are ANTI-AMERICAN. Our way of life is at stake this November. Will you sign this petition to show the Radical Left that our values and freedoms are NOT up for negotiation this November?
[CLICK HERE TO SIGN NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PbLdXAdC1-gVbJTmSErK7AMIaw4vslGl1K7TiiaC44kHTicBaSC6hZV9eDBW-slIquubnaIyZERfJTlo_PU7bcsxybo6WL86wek4sCmNvSAh0mYuRFXAo5XZgAXuRQMvwrW3P0y9wmCDhhZT_nRoI46bCopIRfKlrdOJHcnsGSRgssveNuZGHZu9hXBB-DhD&c=nfbaY9KnTmHJgbuOzHMFBI2ZQQtORYvvPv9brdSZouT1v1m_XT6xuw==&ch=ubWvaiXm4LiaVQKOI-DhVouOtsfdgrwq-Z59hMrPWmXgjYZPBJNYWQ==) Second Amendment Petition
As you know, the Second Amendment is one of our most important and treasured rights. It recognizes that we have a fundamental right to defend our families and stand up to a tyrannical government. This fundamental right is in jeopardy as Joe Biden and Kamala Harris campaign on a gun confiscation program! Will you sign this petition right now to ensure our God-given right to bear arms will NEVER be taken away by the anti-gun Left?
[CLICK HERE TO SIGN NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PbLdXAdC1-gVbJTmSErK7AMIaw4vslGl1K7TiiaC44kHTicBaSC6hZV9eDBW-slIQ-k966WCsxISPYjGXT-DL8BHBT8u3gMFD2V3glWe49FDm7TI96iP7pnBu---5QjYu42K40wSiOfLveuEzFnPhQ==&c=nfbaY9KnTmHJgbuOzHMFBI2ZQQtORYvvPv9brdSZouT1v1m_XT6xuw==&ch=ubWvaiXm4LiaVQKOI-DhVouOtsfdgrwq-Z59hMrPWmXgjYZPBJNYWQ==) Drain the Swamp! Petition
President Trump is right when he says that Washington is a Swamp Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and their Liberal cronies have infested Washington for their own personal gain. Please, sign this petition today to DRAIN THE SWAMP of special interests, lobbyists, and wealthy political insiders!
[CLICK HERE TO SIGN NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PbLdXAdC1-gVbJTmSErK7AMIaw4vslGl1K7TiiaC44kHTicBaSC6hZV9eDBW-slIp4AbbtoN2wnPyjyHJLgfDFtuSJ9N6VBsIhNl_1s3MWorzGOCGzYLmGxYlAVekTzFowXuMIu2qDUl7OwTsrznpkqfr_T3UrnZwjz6m2MUb_Q=&c=nfbaY9KnTmHJgbuOzHMFBI2ZQQtORYvvPv9brdSZouT1v1m_XT6xuw==&ch=ubWvaiXm4LiaVQKOI-DhVouOtsfdgrwq-Z59hMrPWmXgjYZPBJNYWQ==)
Economy Petition
We need an economy that allows small businesses to thrive. For too long, over-regulation and government red tape has prevented the average American citizen from realizing their dream and having the opportunity to start their own business. Will you sign this petition to ensure that Joe Biden and his Obama Era Regulations don't get elected this November?

I urge you to find the issue most important to you and sign it, so your voice is heard, or sign them all if you feel, as we do, that they are ALL important! Petition to Re-open PA As responsible citizens, we did our part to "flatten the curve" and slow the spread of COVID-19. Now that has been accomplished and the virus has been PROVEN not to be as deadly as officials once thought, we need to re-open Pennsylvania. Even worse, they've resorted to bigoted rhetoric to attack who I am and dared to call me an "immigrant who doesn't support immigration" simply because I don't support their Far Left agenda. But the reality is this: POLITICO is still calling this MUST-WIN race a TOSS-UP and the latest poll has us locked in a DEAD HEAT with Pelosi's handpicked candidate. 20 days out from the most critical election of our lifetime, we're running out of time to take the lead. Our FINAL FEC deadline is tonight at midnight. Can I count on you to make a 6X matched donation before the clock runs out and our fundraising numbers go public? Your support has never been more important. | == THE FEC DEADLINE IS TONIGHT AT 11:59 PM I got back into this fight knowing it would be one of the toughest and the closest in the nation. I knew the Left would come after me with everything they've got, and now we're getting down to the wire. If we are going to flip this seat from BLUE to RED, unseat our Far-Left opponent, and take back the House for Republicans, we need your help. == == == THE FEC DEADLINE IS TONIGHT AT 11:59 PM This close to election day, every donation makes a difference, especially in a race as close as this. Your support could mean the difference between keeping our ads running online and going dark... between reaching those on the fence voters who will decide this election or falling just a handful of votes short... between victory and defeat. Whoever wins this seat will determine who controls the House Majority.== To victory, Young Kim During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --== == == Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 ==** | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. It's crystal clear that the Far-Left will do anything to stall, stop and prevent the vacant Supreme Court seat from being filled by President Trump. We need your help to defeat the Far-Left 's obstruction and deceitful schemes. == **== == == == ==** Democrats are livid and they want an activist judge on the bench who will create laws instead of interpreting them. We saw how low the Far-Left is willing to sink with the shameless attacks levied during Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation hearings. They will do anything to get their way. It's time to stand up and fight back. Can we count on you? \--GOP Updates Paid for by Drew Ferguson For Congress PO BOX 71067 Newnan, GA 30271 == | | Drew Ferguson For Congress | PO BOX 71067, Newnan, GA 30271 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
A Senate Democrat who refused to even ask a single question...
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tcPURgL1q-hpMUvH4qGRcuhHHP40iecxWd3OUI80z_eZNu8mGQ6bfYSbmAb2RXCKsNkRWa12rFuA1YOZedLhBpDHY7p9BnMhQCpqsDArQBlu15iLpCXUQG8hWlbo4ReWfNXsNv4VnNHbwab77NJ43UuNR_WcDsO0bAoOVUPF-LIDWKUhBxEUJUqVAOAnds5GRmc9Y6EkMfljM0qLVlJbwMZ5MuRoHQZO0w5HtQ-Y4vRi5FXOzb3v_0HXj5KQhy08akPQkln36m_USKXz3aQ4Zbrv577tYiF-H00N2AveoDY=&c=WuhzXgsZKx-ThzROqBCOvfwUb2Kw8xxFAKnRFc8n2LBo-Ht9Sc329A==&ch=aG87y8PQshJCYEK1420LfXuCP3-_wayqb21scAySi5carhMnjNrCkQ==)

Friend,
---
A Senate Democrat attacked Judge Amy Coney Barrett during her hearing for an ad we made in support of her.
---
But just like Judge Barrett has done since she first sat in the hot seat before the Senate Judiciary Committee, we will stand strong against any and all attacks pushed by the Big Abortion Lobby to derail her confirmation.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help us fight back against the Big Abortion Lobby 's attempts to sabotage Judge Barrett's confirmation process.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tcPURgL1q-hpMUvH4qGRcuhHHP40iecxWd3OUI80z_eZNu8mGQ6bfYSbmAb2RXCKsNkRWa12rFuA1YOZedLhBpDHY7p9BnMhQCpqsDArQBlu15iLpCXUQG8hWlbo4ReWfNXsNv4VnNHbwab77NJ43UuNR_WcDsO0bAoOVUPF-LIDWKUhBxEUJUqVAOAnds5GRmc9Y6EkMfljM0qLVlJbwMZ5MuRoHQZO0w5HtQ-Y4vRi5FXOzb3v_0HXj5KQhy08akPQkln36m_USKXz3aQ4Zbrv577tYiF-H00N2AveoDY=&c=WuhzXgsZKx-ThzROqBCOvfwUb2Kw8xxFAKnRFc8n2LBo-Ht9Sc329A==&ch=aG87y8PQshJCYEK1420LfXuCP3-_wayqb21scAySi5carhMnjNrCkQ==)

**[**CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tcPURgL1q-hpMUvH4qGRcuhHHP40iecxWd3OUI80z_eZNu8mGQ6bfYSbmAb2RXCKsNkRWa12rFuA1YOZedLhBpDHY7p9BnMhQCpqsDArQBlu15iLpCXUQG8hWlbo4ReWfNXsNv4VnNHbwab77NJ43UuNR_WcDsO0bAoOVUPF-LIDWKUhBxEUJUqVAOAnds5GRmc9Y6EkMfljM0qLVlJbwMZ5MuRoHQZO0w5HtQ-Y4vRi5FXOzb3v_0HXj5KQhy08akPQkln36m_USKXz3aQ4Zbrv577tYiF-H00N2AveoDY=&c=WuhzXgsZKx-ThzROqBCOvfwUb2Kw8xxFAKnRFc8n2LBo-Ht9Sc329A==&ch=aG87y8PQshJCYEK1420LfXuCP3-_wayqb21scAySi5carhMnjNrCkQ==)**
---
Senate Democrats aren't really interested in learning about whether Judge Barrett will serve as a formidable justice on the Supreme Court.
---
Instead, they're using these hearings as a campaign attack ad against her.
---
It's appalling that they would try and instill fear in the lives of countless American voters about how she may hypothetically rule on possible cases brought before the Supreme Court.
---
And to ask a religious mother of seven in front of her own children if she's ever sexually violated someone was reprehensible.
---
Speaking of her children... I was in disbelief that Senator Dianne Feinstein was able to compliment Judge Barrett for raising seven beautiful, well-behaved children, and then in the same breath, ask her a question about killing unborn babies.
---
But we shouldn't be surprised, as it was Senator Feinstein who put Judge Barrett in the national spotlight back in 2017 when she tried to disqualify her nomination to the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals for being Catholic.
---
__Despite all of these attacks, let 's show Judge Barrett that the American people are praying for her and fully supporting her at this difficult moment.__
---
[**Please make a contribution to help us fight back against the Big Abortion Lobby 's attempts to sabotage Judge Barrett's confirmation process.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tcPURgL1q-hpMUvH4qGRcuhHHP40iecxWd3OUI80z_eZNu8mGQ6bfYSbmAb2RXCKsNkRWa12rFuA1YOZedLhBpDHY7p9BnMhQCpqsDArQBlu15iLpCXUQG8hWlbo4ReWfNXsNv4VnNHbwab77NJ43UuNR_WcDsO0bAoOVUPF-LIDWKUhBxEUJUqVAOAnds5GRmc9Y6EkMfljM0qLVlJbwMZ5MuRoHQZO0w5HtQ-Y4vRi5FXOzb3v_0HXj5KQhy08akPQkln36m_USKXz3aQ4Zbrv577tYiF-H00N2AveoDY=&c=WuhzXgsZKx-ThzROqBCOvfwUb2Kw8xxFAKnRFc8n2LBo-Ht9Sc329A==&ch=aG87y8PQshJCYEK1420LfXuCP3-_wayqb21scAySi5carhMnjNrCkQ==)
---
For _LIFE_ ,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Jordan=20=2D=20House=20Freedom=20Fund?=
subject: The Green Wave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Democrats are supported by a green wave of small-dollar donations. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/the-green-wave-z1j4mkq3i2?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| Peter: By now, you've heard about the "blue wave" of Democrats that could win this year, but what's powering their campaigns is a **"green wave"** of small-dollar donations. In fact, Democrat candidates are massively out-raising GOP candidates with eye-popping numbers that are up to ten times the amount raised by candidates during this time in the 2018 elections. Our candidates are actually facing a "green tsunami" this year. How is this possible? For more than a decade, the Democrats have been building a **grassroots fundraising base** to fund their candidates. They've done it using a centralized fundraising clearinghouse called ActBlue to process low-dollar contributions for their campaigns. **Rather than only donating to local candidates, the Democrats are giving to candidates thousands of miles away.** This has helped liberals raise unimaginable sums that could keep Nancy Pelosi the Speaker of the House for years to come. [**We need to use the same national model to fight back!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=a9af07f82b&e=b2c16e6198) U.S. House races are federal elections that impact all Americans so it doesn't matter where you live – we all have an interest in helping the best candidates compete and win. **We need to work together to make sure the right candidates get the support they need to get their message out.** That's why I support the House Freedom Fund, which gives conservatives across country an easy way to donate directly to multiple candidates for the U.S. House. [**Please fight back against the "green tsunami" by making a split contribution to these priority candidates:**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=52094fbde8&e=b2c16e6198) ✅ Lauren Boebert (CO-03)
✅ Nick Freitas (VA-07)
✅ Christina Hagan (OH-13)
✅ Yvette Herrell (NM-02)
✅ Jeanne Ives (IL-06)
✅ Jim Marchant (NV-04)
✅ Rich McCormick (GA-07)
✅ Matt Mowers (NH-01)
✅ Jim Oberweis (IL-14)
✅ Burgess Owens (UT-04)
✅ Scott Perry (PA-10)

name: Lynn Guidry
subject: Another cop under fire
body:
Dear Friend, I am sickened to see what is going on in this country. It seems like every day I see good, honest police officers being physically attacked or prosecuted just for being cops. When the riots against our nation's law enforcement officers started earlier this year, I prayed every night that my husband - Officer Israel Guidry - would not become a victim of the war going on against cops. But then a few months later, it happened. That's me, my husband Israel, and our grandchildren. Now, I have nowhere else to turn but to complete strangers like you **[and ask for help to save my husband from being sent to prison for a crime he did not commit.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QqMWHs0v_8qEkgLY6Z1_5gWpxrcVJmrGDIAeBVH3cMKvDUah3ZiDgT9XEEEd1SXlSm-d2TtiIDEeZAkrphkrLzEXwbGcZ6OUT_cl0qKxFTDs2CAlBsrLU4Sc0HOkxa3q5EJN4xUEy8CZOivQOvmwyxX8e2pW6I-OYpJRIxXAQyo-OIxeqUKL9ObaQKyAcRTK&c=yPEBRmZ3tuHHFLZMQeKcEFCAmwHSWVSL5lrkhTMQuC5lMWGF2fOnMQ==&ch=pOreJlrdgH50mV0XuOaUm9V8KzOCvo7V0HCi8IAybpiWLvvMLdB2Ew==)**

About a year ago, my husband was on a routine patrol in our small town when he noticed a large, Ford F-150 truck driving erratically.

Israel flipped on his police lights and attempted to pull the truck driver over.

However, the driver - a woman named Angela Perkins - knew that she would surely be arrested if she pulled over.

_Aside from being intoxicated behind the wheel, she was carrying a loaded .22 revolver, 12 grams of marijuana, and devices used to smoke crystal methamphetamines._

So rather than cooperate, she stepped on the gas and successfully got away...

... until a few moments later when Israel found the truck stuck in a ditch and the suspect revving her engine, frantically trying to get out.

When my husband caught up to her, he got out of his police cruiser and slowly walked towards the driver's side - keeping a hand on his service weapon in case Angela tried to do anything dangerous.

As Israel got closer, she revved her engine one last time, got out of the ditch, and backed into a residential driveway.

**Then, looking at my husband directly in the eyes, she floored the gas pedal and tried to run him over.**

My husband is a fighter.

_Before serving in law enforcement, he was enlisted in the U.S. Army. So he is no stranger to life-threatening situations._

Nevertheless, I cannot even begin to describe the terrified look in his eyes when he came home that night and told me how close he was to never seeing me or our kids again.

In the split seconds when he thought he was going to be run over and killed, he pulled out his service weapon and fired five times on the oncoming truck - striking the criminal suspect once in her lower back.

At the last second, the truck swerved past Israel and continued down the highway until she crashed in a ditch.

When Israel caught up, he rushed to the flipped over truck to administer first aid while his backup arrived.

Sadly, she died a few hours later in the hospital from over-intoxication and the crash.

_The autopsy found a high level of methamphetamines in her blood at the time of the incident._

Friend, I still cannot believe what happened that day...

That's why it was such a shock when this summer - in the middle of the anti-cop wave sweeping the country - Israel was charged with voluntary manslaughter and armed criminal action. Charges that could put him behind bars for at least 10 years.

My husband was nearly killed by an intoxicated criminal evader.

And he did what he had to do to defend himself in the line of duty.

**[Now, I have no choice but to ask you for a small gift of $15, $25, $50, or more to help keep my husband out of prison.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QqMWHs0v_8qEkgLY6Z1_5gWpxrcVJmrGDIAeBVH3cMKvDUah3ZiDgT9XEEEd1SXlSm-d2TtiIDEeZAkrphkrLzEXwbGcZ6OUT_cl0qKxFTDs2CAlBsrLU4Sc0HOkxa3q5EJN4xUEy8CZOivQOvmwyxX8e2pW6I-OYpJRIxXAQyo-OIxeqUKL9ObaQKyAcRTK&c=yPEBRmZ3tuHHFLZMQeKcEFCAmwHSWVSL5lrkhTMQuC5lMWGF2fOnMQ==&ch=pOreJlrdgH50mV0XuOaUm9V8KzOCvo7V0HCi8IAybpiWLvvMLdB2Ew==) **

Since Israel was charged, the thoughts of what could happen to my family have kept me painfully awake at night...

_Thoughts of what might happen if he is convicted and put in a prison cell with some of the same criminals, he has taken off the streets._

_Thoughts of our children growing up without a dad and our grandchildren growing up without a grandpa._

_Thoughts on how in the world we would scrape together the money to afford a defense attorney to get Israel cleared of his bogus charges._

Miraculously, as that last thought crossed my mind, we got a call from Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments.

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, but they are also trying to raise money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses.

And as a non-profit organization, they depend solely on the generous gifts from folks like you to defend officers like Israel.

So today, I must ask you one of the most challenging questions I have ever asked anyone.

**[Could you send a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more to LELDF today to help defend my husband?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QqMWHs0v_8qEkgLY6Z1_5gWpxrcVJmrGDIAeBVH3cMKvDUah3ZiDgT9XEEEd1SXlSm-d2TtiIDEeZAkrphkrLzEXwbGcZ6OUT_cl0qKxFTDs2CAlBsrLU4Sc0HOkxa3q5EJN4xUEy8CZOivQOvmwyxX8e2pW6I-OYpJRIxXAQyo-OIxeqUKL9ObaQKyAcRTK&c=yPEBRmZ3tuHHFLZMQeKcEFCAmwHSWVSL5lrkhTMQuC5lMWGF2fOnMQ==&ch=pOreJlrdgH50mV0XuOaUm9V8KzOCvo7V0HCi8IAybpiWLvvMLdB2Ew==)**

As a police officer's wife, I have always been prepared for the reality that my husband could get in dangerous situations like these.

But I was never prepared for the possibility that he would go to prison for doing his job and defending himself in the line of duty.

**[I hope I can count on you to send a tax-deductible gift to the LELDF's Police Defense Fund to keep an innocent cop out of prison.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QqMWHs0v_8qEkgLY6Z1_5gWpxrcVJmrGDIAeBVH3cMKvDUah3ZiDgT9XEEEd1SXlSm-d2TtiIDEeZAkrphkrLzEXwbGcZ6OUT_cl0qKxFTDs2CAlBsrLU4Sc0HOkxa3q5EJN4xUEy8CZOivQOvmwyxX8e2pW6I-OYpJRIxXAQyo-OIxeqUKL9ObaQKyAcRTK&c=yPEBRmZ3tuHHFLZMQeKcEFCAmwHSWVSL5lrkhTMQuC5lMWGF2fOnMQ==&ch=pOreJlrdgH50mV0XuOaUm9V8KzOCvo7V0HCi8IAybpiWLvvMLdB2Ew==)**

Thank you for reading my letter.

And thank you - in advance - on behalf of the families of wrongly-accused police officers being helped by LELDF.

Sincerely, Lynn Guidry [_**Please, support the Police Defense Fund today >>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QqMWHs0v_8qEkgLY6Z1_5gWpxrcVJmrGDIAeBVH3cMKvDUah3ZiDgT9XEEEd1SXlSm-d2TtiIDEeZAkrphkrLzEXwbGcZ6OUT_cl0qKxFTDs2CAlBsrLU4Sc0HOkxa3q5EJN4xUEy8CZOivQOvmwyxX8e2pW6I-OYpJRIxXAQyo-OIxeqUKL9ObaQKyAcRTK&c=yPEBRmZ3tuHHFLZMQeKcEFCAmwHSWVSL5lrkhTMQuC5lMWGF2fOnMQ==&ch=pOreJlrdgH50mV0XuOaUm9V8KzOCvo7V0HCi8IAybpiWLvvMLdB2Ew==) "It is important that we, as citizens, back up those officers, and to make sure that they are not financially bankrupted, or even perhaps wrongfully convicted--and that's why the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund is so important." Former U.S. Attorney General Edwin Meese III **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QqMWHs0v_8qEkgLY6Z1_5gWpxrcVJmrGDIAeBVH3cMKvDUah3ZiDgT9XEEEd1SXlSm-d2TtiIDEeZAkrphkrLzEXwbGcZ6OUT_cl0qKxFTDs2CAlBsrLU4Sc0HOkxa3q5EJN4xUEy8CZOivQOvmwyxX8e2pW6I-OYpJRIxXAQyo-OIxeqUKL9ObaQKyAcRTK&c=yPEBRmZ3tuHHFLZMQeKcEFCAmwHSWVSL5lrkhTMQuC5lMWGF2fOnMQ==&ch=pOreJlrdgH50mV0XuOaUm9V8KzOCvo7V0HCi8IAybpiWLvvMLdB2Ew==)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QqMWHs0v_8qEkgLY6Z1_5gWpxrcVJmrGDIAeBVH3cMKvDUah3ZiDgQ4fpk1zD8eofahgGnRaF_e8jlY4PmIhubFIRkKJO6Dle3_CGTnmsLuJSSGfzMM8bAl_z6FkTC7r_qiJBCuhH1X8npqM8WUCUK8GE0qluk3H&c=yPEBRmZ3tuHHFLZMQeKcEFCAmwHSWVSL5lrkhTMQuC5lMWGF2fOnMQ==&ch=pOreJlrdgH50mV0XuOaUm9V8KzOCvo7V0HCi8IAybpiWLvvMLdB2Ew==)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QqMWHs0v_8qEkgLY6Z1_5gWpxrcVJmrGDIAeBVH3cMKvDUah3ZiDgQ4fpk1zD8eoNnZDfsQWG6bQuRN6IT56CY7RbqGEdzhao3z65NNfqtJ4mFZ2ZesRFun6Ubqm_9Hi1WALLuo3c9_pGPiBQW6O9TvgpoJFFkSX&c=yPEBRmZ3tuHHFLZMQeKcEFCAmwHSWVSL5lrkhTMQuC5lMWGF2fOnMQ==&ch=pOreJlrdgH50mV0XuOaUm9V8KzOCvo7V0HCi8IAybpiWLvvMLdB2Ew==) | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QqMWHs0v_8qEkgLY6Z1_5gWpxrcVJmrGDIAeBVH3cMKvDUah3ZiDgQ4fpk1zD8eodfuhwyCQ982hUBOrjBBhL_Mvfyq1jLtWw5aq4cE84Ehc4vXVpUeRXwF8hVlxtjaUSvp0gUkNwQ3dFLnwsZaJMQ==&c=yPEBRmZ3tuHHFLZMQeKcEFCAmwHSWVSL5lrkhTMQuC5lMWGF2fOnMQ==&ch=pOreJlrdgH50mV0XuOaUm9V8KzOCvo7V0HCi8IAybpiWLvvMLdB2Ew==) | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QqMWHs0v_8qEkgLY6Z1_5gWpxrcVJmrGDIAeBVH3cMKvDUah3ZiDgQ4fpk1zD8eoSIgrMleFarphfVrX0-u-vAK3upFElloEaOEJwaHvGPu8i14Ed6sl-PuXLRgDrNA7mgGDVBwHhO0hp9LE2nMK7HaaeqvSHoOovfFR7Weh1lviMoClPn2U59dKo1ULSLmD&c=yPEBRmZ3tuHHFLZMQeKcEFCAmwHSWVSL5lrkhTMQuC5lMWGF2fOnMQ==&ch=pOreJlrdgH50mV0XuOaUm9V8KzOCvo7V0HCi8IAybpiWLvvMLdB2Ew==)

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Did we make a mistake, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
I haven't heard from you in a while. I need to know if you're still with me. To continue the fight against the far left socialists in the Senate, I need to know YOUR priorities. Please help by filling out my 2020 Priority Survey!
Click [here to unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ui/modules/display/optOut.jsp?&m=43633876&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTg2MTE2MzQ1MAS2&mt=2&rj=MTg2MTE2MzQ0OQS2&rt=0).

I haven't heard from you in a while. **I need to know if you 're still with me.**

I've spent the past several months fighting the left-wing mob at their own game. I stood up to the liberal New York Times, I stood up to the Chinese Communist Party, and I called out the Hollywood elite.

To continue the fight against the far left socialists in the Senate, I need to know YOUR priorities. Please help by filling out my [**2020 Priority Survey!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2MzM4NzYS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg2MTE2MzQ1MAS2&mt=2&rj=MTg2MTE2MzQ0OQS2&rt=0) _****_ | [2020 Priority Survey](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2MzM4NzYS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg2MTE2MzQ1MAS2&mt=2&rj=MTg2MTE2MzQ0OQS2&rt=0)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. name: Finance Team, MJ Hegar HQ
subject: We've crunched the numbers. Here's what they're telling us...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Where we're at today...

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c6e/7f51f7bc/47f0b1ea/4efbf55e/2803772714/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c6e/7f51f7bc/47f0b1ea/4efbf55d/2803772714/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-FECdeadline?refcode=email_20201014.1nd__2312__&amount=10")
---
Peter, this is where we're at today:
* Our _final_ FEC deadline of the campaign is at MIDNIGHT.
* We're behind where we need to be.
* The numbers have been crunched, and they're telling us that we MUST raise $200K by the deadline to get back on track.

[PITCH IN TO CLOSE THE GAP](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c6e/7f51f7bc/47f0b1ea/4efbf55d/2803772714/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-FECdeadline?refcode=email_20201014.1nd__2312__&amount=10")
---
It's crucial that we have the resources to go toe-to-toe with Sen. Cornyn's big-money donors these last 20 days -- but first, _we need to pick up the pace._

[**Peter, will you chip in before midnight to help us hit our FINAL FEC deadline and retire Sen. Cornyn on Election Day?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c6e/7f51f7bc/47f0b1ea/4efbf55d/2803772714/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-FECdeadline?refcode=email_20201014.1nd__2312__&amount=10")
\-- Finance Department, Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c6e/7f51f7bc/47f0b1ea/4efbf55d/2803772714/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-FECdeadline?refcode=email_20201014.1nd__2312__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c6e/7f51f7bc/47f0b1ea/4efbf55c/2803772714/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2312&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c6e/7f51f7bc/47f0b1ea/4efbf553/2803772714/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, ""**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. body:
After my debate last night, I wanted to take a second to address the facts. I've spent the past 6 years working hard for all four corners of Colorado, passing more legislation than the entire Colorado delegation.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gHYni0q31BT2lQS71eiy3UP2oNQ8fWNFmMheJk3opMTtAKxbebakYzjuRfZxQwnuIuK2wAmbtG24AMVU_4DTcNXGoCdZ7L_uuWa5MBNkc4oL8-dbu7rrCiu-zirvBwlGfbvEccRhqRAhOBg4ln99nGjQaiaIs0TViCzAXd_JDPX7N4rSyBJj0ruzQ7mPVfPJeEEIM6HxzaiWSTPkIuP377LP00DEAds74fcIhBKRKIPmw-PPIJsqb8Xq19HU3udCUh9V9A1NnxOhSQ5UyUE4AAoPyfcZY2zthxZoK5jwXJqMH67u9lv9UhisSUkScALbOpksxFZxhEZoS678upSR4Dmr_MlbI0jCxPZzQDscDV7Tf-vEi72IkI2OBj0fqHQRoOffTBOSUrYJ3uGL4jOiXmhhM6k4KnwKDFEvhSWnWeBt2yf3Swu35MfK0wcLGLWTkdyql-NuX30=&c=jTjLZNSSn4C869Ev8tlhz8lJBeYDKJ2nYzQ91upU9_gt51_-wW-MTg==&ch=Mn6HcB9uLY-g38iMFIBtdoGqIEZ2fx3zf1pi7fMvE8H-rCxlBCFwXA==)
Friend,

After my debate last night, I wanted to take a second to address the facts.

I've spent the past 6 years working hard for all four corners of Colorado, passing more legislation than the entire Colorado delegation combined. After leading landmark bills like the 9-8-8 suicide prevention hotline bill and the Great American Outdoors Act, I've continued my work to ensure I represent all of my constituents.

**John Hickenlooper wants you to believe fallacies about job creation through the Green New Deal, which would decimate Colorado Energy Jobs. He wants to tell you about his new Healthcare plan, eliminating private insurance for millions of Americans. Above all, he wants to believe that all of my work for Colorado is simply meaningless.**

I'm asking for your support today, Friend, as we head into these last few critical days until the election, we are pushing hard to the finish line! Will you stand with me today?
**[**DEFEND COLORADO - DONATE NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gHYni0q31BT2lQS71eiy3UP2oNQ8fWNFmMheJk3opMTtAKxbebakYzjuRfZxQwnuIuK2wAmbtG24AMVU_4DTcNXGoCdZ7L_uuWa5MBNkc4oL8-dbu7rrCiu-zirvBwlGfbvEccRhqRAhOBg4ln99nGjQaiaIs0TViCzAXd_JDPX7N4rSyBJj0ruzQ7mPVfPJeEEIM6HxzaiWSTPkIuP377LP00DEAds74fcIhBKRKIPmw-PPIJsqb8Xq19HU3udCUh9V9A1NnxOhSQ5UyUE4AAoPyfcZY2zthxZoK5jwXJqMH67u9lv9UhisSUkScALbOpksxFZxhEZoS678upSR4Dmr_MlbI0jCxPZzQDscDV7Tf-vEi72IkI2OBj0fqHQRoOffTBOSUrYJ3uGL4jOiXmhhM6k4KnwKDFEvhSWnWeBt2yf3Swu35MfK0wcLGLWTkdyql-NuX30=&c=jTjLZNSSn4C869Ev8tlhz8lJBeYDKJ2nYzQ91upU9_gt51_-wW-MTg==&ch=Mn6HcB9uLY-g38iMFIBtdoGqIEZ2fx3zf1pi7fMvE8H-rCxlBCFwXA==)**
---

This election is not about me, but the people of the great state of Colorado. John Hickenlooper continues to make the argument about him, but I will never waiver in my battle to fight for YOU, the American people.

I hope you will stand with me today and help me continue my fight in these final days until the election!
**[**DEFEND COLORADO - DONATE NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gHYni0q31BT2lQS71eiy3UP2oNQ8fWNFmMheJk3opMTtAKxbebakYzjuRfZxQwnuIuK2wAmbtG24AMVU_4DTcNXGoCdZ7L_uuWa5MBNkc4oL8-dbu7rrCiu-zirvBwlGfbvEccRhqRAhOBg4ln99nGjQaiaIs0TViCzAXd_JDPX7N4rSyBJj0ruzQ7mPVfPJeEEIM6HxzaiWSTPkIuP377LP00DEAds74fcIhBKRKIPmw-PPIJsqb8Xq19HU3udCUh9V9A1NnxOhSQ5UyUE4AAoPyfcZY2zthxZoK5jwXJqMH67u9lv9UhisSUkScALbOpksxFZxhEZoS678upSR4Dmr_MlbI0jCxPZzQDscDV7Tf-vEi72IkI2OBj0fqHQRoOffTBOSUrYJ3uGL4jOiXmhhM6k4KnwKDFEvhSWnWeBt2yf3Swu35MfK0wcLGLWTkdyql-NuX30=&c=jTjLZNSSn4C869Ev8tlhz8lJBeYDKJ2nYzQ91upU9_gt51_-wW-MTg==&ch=Mn6HcB9uLY-g38iMFIBtdoGqIEZ2fx3zf1pi7fMvE8H-rCxlBCFwXA==)**

Thank you for your time and gracious support,

Cory
