name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Join Me TONIGHT at 7 pm for an event with trailblazing WOMEN!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | **You are invited TONIGHT!** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/jxizzXycryOZfX-WVjSorSj-Z28dGMK6sb8YB41Gk4k=) **Click the Button below to RSVP to the event** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/jxizzXycryOZfX-WVjSorSj-Z28dGMK6sb8YB41Gk4k=) Please join me in a fascinating conversation with these trailblazing women who are national leaders setting the stage for a fair and equitable world:: Cecile Richards is a national leader for women's rights and social and economic justice, and a co-founder of Supermajority ([https://supermajority.com/](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/POeHPW39jy9tt4t_oicm2Xms_REkFtUu-xqZ-3DR0wk=) )-- a new organization fighting for gender equity. As President of Planned Parenthood Federation of America and Planned Parenthood Action Fund for 12 years, Richards worked to increase affordable access to reproductive health care and to build a healthier and safer world for women and young people. In 2011 and 2012, she was named one of TIME Magazine's 100 Most Influential People in the World. Emily Cain joins EMILY's List ([https://www.emilyslist.org/](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/-Jw_TelHwnEjKBQaQc0pAiVCfOBPm1cltShqvp0u7b0=)) as Executive Director with a decade of experience as a state legislator and public policy leader, two cycles as one of the country's top ranked Democratic congressional candidates, more than a decade of work in higher education and recent leadership as Chief Strategy Officer for a private sector tech company. Shaughnessy Naughton, is an entrepreneur with a degree in chemistry who is the Founder and President of 314 Action ([https://314action.org/](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/CvU6hDQTfkvJENiytf4fTAU2YEhphck25CWvV_RN7Uo=)) which encourages and unites the scientific community to do more than just advocate for science, and to get involved in the political process. With a background in research and drug discovery, Shaughnessy got involved in politics out of concern for the future of science in the United States. Aimee Allison is founder and president of [She the People](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/XwCNOFvh26vPzv9NfHXnXtVcPwDbweqnxZzqhiTprBg=), a national network elevating the voice and power of women of color. A democratic innovator and visionary, Ms. Allison leads national efforts to build inclusive, multiracial coalitions led by women of color. She leverages media, research and analysis to increase voter engagement and advocate for racial, economic and gender justice. She brings together voters, organizers, and elected leaders in a movement grounded in values of love, justice, belonging, and democracy. In 2018, Ms. Allison was one of the primary architects of the "year of women of color in politics." Thank you in advance and together we can move PA forward. Humbly Yours,
Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/ypUSFAPbHc5YL30R0WPl6T_obNSH47hfLCWjErJQuxs=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/jxizzXycryOZfX-WVjSorSj-Z28dGMK6sb8YB41Gk4k=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/8_MLwu6kW7tkhRC3oRN5skZAGsKLUquXIgp_fPMidsg=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/a5-rk-wuPPe6Hyv5jtOOcVw0LKKPrBNB_SyAqPMIssI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C5fkXLRScrJLCut5pwOnjs6rLAkZ0C9NcOonH3kCq1M=/Vz3LLNVWfucwXgJMMwocwTj2Ry7rmKKdFBHBJYem0C0=?hl=en)

Emily Cain joins EMILY's List (=) as Executive Director with a decade of experience as a state legislator and public policy leader, two cycles as one of the country's top ranked Democratic congressional candidates, more than a decade of work in higher education and recent leadership as Chief Strategy Officer for a private sector tech company. Shaughnessy Naughton, is an entrepreneur with a degree in chemistry who is the Founder and President of 314 Action (=) which encourages and unites the scientific community to do more than just advocate for science, and to get involved in the political process. With a background in research and drug discovery, Shaughnessy got involved in politics out of concern for the future of science in the United States. Aimee Allison is founder and president of =, a national network elevating the voice and power of women of color. A democratic innovator and visionary, Ms. Allison leads national efforts to build inclusive, multiracial coalitions led by women of color. She leverages media, research and analysis to increase voter engagement and advocate for racial, economic and gender justice. She brings together voters, organizers, and elected leaders in a movement grounded in values of love, justice, belonging, and democracy. In 2018, Ms. Allison was one of the primary architects of the "year of women of color in politics." Thank you in advance and together we can move PA forward. Humbly Yours, Nina Learn more by visiting our website: = = Follow us on Social Media: = = Copyright (C) Nina for PA. All rights reserved. subject: Will you watch this before tonight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bice for Congress
body:
In Congress, Stephanie will work for you, not Nancy Pelosi. Kendra Horn just doesn't get it. Oil and gas is a huge part of this district, and we need a leader in Congress who will always put us first.
Hi Friend, Stephanie just released a new commercial, and she wanted us to show you first! ⬇️ **CLICK TO WATCH** ⬇️ [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p4SvUQ9rbZz5H5EknTtZQQRahsGIjSgJIHV3K9REDO2tPMAy2R316exPDW5VClLG27nq9SkKN4HjONMWJR1Ck-lePaH6XM4CS0kg-qFXN9L1bnmEhkLsQl-0I-Oghpx7cNq0wuuGozoEAXzanLRnnvWK-35cdb3KJvl71PRE54OYJ1x-LG15oN_uB-W94WsCsfP0WCXbUwiEyXT1np_V8Twlzfqg-NPjAjvFkvyavBdb9MBDYx9vFrqroo08FtrA07CkV3PQctDbxHUPBwixC_rHhhzj8jQ-AT3IawzNewETNY9g5vKe-dcR0gXks4GunQJ199uzh2J6WGiFzJZ06z1ahJA_8287Jm-yhb5fu6CsxLMlRpOTKiZ_ITUvsNiOy459Fu8DEqHyRGbyp2k8Ev1RHeDrb41m&c=ZDDVfA-RtV_mqZgm5H2dWA67_8UBaXBnZnGsxgpvt-ZlzOGNRoeZbQ==&ch=jdNgntlDWwK-xXO2-4nEylPzTgw5osZ2L8Sdco8aa_jsKfEGXxxqRg==) Stephanie's family is one of the 90,000 directly impacted by Oklahoma's oil and gas industry. In the state senate, Stephanie has stood up for O&G jobs because her family, and so many families like hers, depend on it. Stephanie knows that we can't rebuild our economy by attacking the industry that so many Oklahoma families depend on. But, Friend, that's all Kendra Horn has been doing. **Horn just doesn 't get it.** She does not support these jobs and the thousands in our community that rely on it. body:
Fellow Conservative,

body:
My notes
[_DEFEND THE SENATE MAJORITY_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-LNFgPl5ntTni86jVBZtY6EczLWKPYL_fe1NRK92CTcRvDWOvH1ZsOn0ufV_nwYcX7D02deCET06OVjT8fNZO9Jlm2UkqNoV6CfhYoXGnMlTAtzjj3XTstTWH5nvPQJ0T8zNnn26KEHNFmJ7CIFXFNnsEZ2b_FcVUo0BV5rMSJsO7z_sPkP21KoOaNaxFd7lrctS1SXatlwdH8hTn934oGtyvjdHIuypwFMYtx7Wb0UNsVGwMpRDhfQ8RCXOcZzkGNEqBTz69taixHmhRdRyXu3Nxlc9BFZegyvj87XXkKBSS2cNywKHmevzKLjZWVvvEVAShiv6uOOIIsx3Nsly85ZJGajx5TwquUvEYK4TYDfSbiPt7t5ihqCDaHxClMpJH29xUk1kwjHUuGyVJ7yLiQEqrOK7YfjE&c=hRIp7yeMtnW6hebd99Uhy3pNuwkOuXTDenolkCf2vu6DkXKVNn0VgA==&ch=DKzzOcA_4GoMRQgQfKyAAMFJo5Gvsupkq-RYKMVWpSd1y260mD5fTw==)

Friend, I just must show you this. I'm so glad to see what Susan Collins has said about her campaign in a recent Politico article.
Of the millions of dollars in negative advertising being spent to ruin her good name Sen. Collins had this to say:
_" It's very frustrating because it's backed by so much money. And it's been going on for two years now: Non-stop negative ads. That eventually it pulls you down," Collins said of the campaign against her. "**What's amazing is that I 'm still going to win.**" _
**That is the Susan Collins I know and respect: fiery, smart, level headed and grounded.**

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Get your Voter Guide today!
body:
| | Peter, November 3 is quickly approaching, do you know what’s on your Virginia ballot? If not, don’t panic! We are excited to announce that our Voter Guides are live. It’s critical that you know the candidates’ positions on the issues that matter to our biblical values. Don’t forget that early voting in Virginia is September 18 - October 31. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18fsb6bYz7sWlt-7NXJ7C2Xf6qBg4iG8QfSm4DqDSy90w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201014com01&n=1) **We have multiple guides available to help you:**
* [Comprehensive Voter Guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18fsb6bYz7sWlt-7NXJ7C2Xf6qBg4iG8QfSm4DqDSy90w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201014com01&n=2) \- every candidate and referendum on your ballot explained
* [Presidential Voter Guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18Fj8qrlDHqZbvJwCcZ6GMqhxJZOucExzfkRJfFXYNhKc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201014com01&n=3)
* [Party Platform Guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iWpC2DEzv9E1TzWlgwOLur_oQQUeQcfaqavA4pEdgZUw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201014com01&n=4)

With only a few short weeks left until the election, we encourage you to pass this along to your friends, family, and church community. Don’t wait until the last minute to do your ballot research. There is so much at stake this November and it is our job, as followers of Christ, to stand united for the sanctity of life, marriage and family, and religious freedom. Your voice and your vote can encourage meaningful change in your community, state, and throughout our nation. **Let your faith fuel your vote on November 3. It is time for the family of faith to stand for our Judeo-Christian values at the polls.** Please pass this message along and join us in the mission to _engage_ ,_empower_ , and _equip_ Christians to vote! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18fsb6bYz7sWlt-7NXJ7C2Xf6qBg4iG8QfSm4DqDSy90w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201014com01&n=5) **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201014com01&n=6)
---

name: Lisa Collis
subject: My husband Mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek,

I remember those nerve-wracking moments, sitting with my husband Mark as the results rolled in on election night 2014. That race was a lot closer than anyone anticipated -- Mark won by less than 1%. We all know the stakes are even higher this year, and that's why I'm asking for your help in these final weeks before Election Day.

As we all face this pandemic together, I know Mark is the public servant Virginia needs right now. As Governor, and now as Senator, I've watched him navigate tough negotiations through difficult days to make life better for Virginians. If there's a way for Mark to solve a problem or help folks in need, it's just about impossible to get him off the phone until it's done. I'm a little biased, but I think that's the kind of leadership that we need now more than ever.

These are challenging times, but my husband still believes there are brighter days ahead for our country and our Commonwealth. That's Mark. Always thinking about the future and trying to bring people together around the things that unite them.

With so much at stake in this election, we can't afford to take anything for granted. Early voting is already underway in Virginia, so I'm asking for your help to make sure we re-elect Mark, keep Virginia blue and flip the Senate.

[**Will you make a donation to help keep Mark in the Senate, serving Virginians?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da5d/53d9897e/555f60dd/1c88f481/4233258027/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-octmm?refcode=20201014_f_1_nd__866__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

Thank you for your support.
-- Lisa Collis

clean_body: | | | Derek, I remember those nerve-wracking moments, sitting with my husband Mark as the results rolled in on election night 2014. That race was a lot closer than anyone anticipated -- Mark won by less than 1%. We all know the stakes are even higher this year, and that's why I'm asking for your help in these final weeks before Election Day. As we all face this pandemic together, I know Mark is the public servant Virginia needs right now. As Governor, and now as Senator, I've watched him navigate tough negotiations through difficult days to make life better for Virginians. If there's a way for Mark to solve a problem or help folks in need, it's just about impossible to get him off the phone until it's done. I'm a little biased, but I think that's the kind of leadership that we need now more than ever. These are challenging times, but my husband still believes there are brighter days ahead for our country and our Commonwealth. That's Mark. Always thinking about the future and trying to bring people together around the things that unite them. With so much at stake in this election, we can't afford to take anything for granted. Early voting is already underway in Virginia, so I'm asking for your help to make sure we re-elect Mark, keep Virginia blue and flip the Senate. body:
An important update from us.
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
|
---
|
---
| October 2020 Newsletter
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
Friends,
As we approach a very critical time in our nation's trajectory, it is critical that we are civically engaged and exercise our right to vote . As we have witnessed, leadership matters so let us all make sure we make a plan to vote and encourage others to do the same. In many locations, Early voting is already underway. A tremendous amount is at stake this election cycle so it is critical that you vote!
Voting & Election Information:
Election time is here! Registered voters should be mindful of the following, and Make a Plan to Vote:

* Mail-In Voting: Make sure you follow the instructions included with your mail in ballot materials. Make sure to include adequate postage and timely mail in your ballot (or drop it off, if applicable to your jurisdiction) to the designated locations for your respective county.

* For Texas Voters: In order to vote by mail, you must:
* Be away from the county of residence on Election Day and during early voting period;
* Be sick or disabled;
* Be 65 years of age or older; or
* Be confined in jail, but eligible to vote.

* Harris County Residents: If you are registered to vote in Harris County, you must apply for your mail-in ballot by October 23rd (this is the date the office must be in receipt of the application to vote by mail).

---
| | [Track the Status of your Mail Ballot Here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015eRa5K5VRlR6JMSE1WvvLhcn_vlmh-gK-0EqVBMm_LAPgM-cTXue6MBq_Gdwh-slo5s13AOLNVX13GFvueT9ajHR049hLMEiw8tAhe6uh8HOrnZQahLC-TOtCKdU92WgZ4V3SeiJ-l7TqIMz0qS6F1h4HY5z5HvgGXeBHEOGXRkvt-Stt8mJ9w==&c=djVyxLaS1UZS4eRWXnFdZuBG--LL-epABDBYtBZ_we8DhRFh1TZz2g==&ch=aoWhTNTnNO8ugY5_YKqQmXHM-CP51tgamhIVQoX5J1Bs9Beou-vSKw==)
---
| |
* In-Person Voting: If you are voting in person, try to vote during the Early Voting period so you may interact with fewer people and be as safe as possible. In Texas, Early Voting is from October 13th to October 30th . Some jurisdictions have opened up drive-through voting options, 24 hour voting options and larger polling sites like sporting venues. Please research the times and locations for Early Voting and the times and locations for Election Day - as they may be different. If you are voting in person, but not able to vote during the Early Voting period, please vote on Election Day (November 3rd).

* Harris County Residents: In Harris County, please visit [harrisvotes.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015eRa5K5VRlR6JMSE1WvvLhcn_vlmh-gK-0EqVBMm_LAPgM-cTXue6MBq_Gdwh-slXYs9B00Zb87P-_wpDneUfwrejVySKhmnKgcx6aErMwvRlVTaWjT5qP3OZ3-5NHN0wzqSqGS2IjUQDkv_OOJ30Q==&c=djVyxLaS1UZS4eRWXnFdZuBG--LL-epABDBYtBZ_we8DhRFh1TZz2g==&ch=aoWhTNTnNO8ugY5_YKqQmXHM-CP51tgamhIVQoX5J1Bs9Beou-vSKw==) for information about polling locations, hours of operations and safety considerations.

If you are located in Harris County and have any additional questions, please visit [harrisvotes.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015eRa5K5VRlR6JMSE1WvvLhcn_vlmh-gK-0EqVBMm_LAPgM-cTXue6MBq_Gdwh-sldAaxaxIYO3G15s6FyuyF8v4H1nW93NDpPjVEarQfo1gopbV1djpTzm-thveUGRJbJZlVcV3yXBupm8H-38G_ZQ==&c=djVyxLaS1UZS4eRWXnFdZuBG--LL-epABDBYtBZ_we8DhRFh1TZz2g==&ch=aoWhTNTnNO8ugY5_YKqQmXHM-CP51tgamhIVQoX5J1Bs9Beou-vSKw==) or call 713.755.6965.

The Edwards Empowerment Talks Podcast is Here!
---
In response to the need to inspire and empower people during these challenging times, I recently launched my podcast, The Edwards Empowerment Talks! Through this platform, I invite inspiring guests to tell their personal stories of perseverance and defying the odds to encourage my listeners and viewers to stay focused and dig deep in order to do the same in their own lives. I also invite guests whose community work will equip listeners and viewers with the tools to impact change in their own community, as well. Please make sure to SUBSCRIBE TODAY by clicking [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015eRa5K5VRlR6JMSE1WvvLhcn_vlmh-gK-0EqVBMm_LAPgM-cTXue6MBq_Gdwh-slBD4fzre_iawJp3aomoP5Uzevkp5pDQSxluxs8CkI-KROqRDlYyAOBgLexxWf_TE5DafL_N8cOE7bG7qapDBsg1Bm8Jj8upW4&c=djVyxLaS1UZS4eRWXnFdZuBG--LL-epABDBYtBZ_we8DhRFh1TZz2g==&ch=aoWhTNTnNO8ugY5_YKqQmXHM-CP51tgamhIVQoX5J1Bs9Beou-vSKw==).

In Episode 01 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has an honest conversation about resilience and public service with Svante Myrick, Mayor of Ithaca, New York. From a homeless child to Ithaca's youngest Mayor (at age 24) and its first Mayor of color, Svante Myrick's journey is the epitome of defying the odds in the face of adversity. This Episode is one you do not want to miss.

From her background as a collegiate rugby player to her success in the Women's Professional Football League, Dr. Jen did not travel the road most traveled. If you have ever been up against unlikely odds or if you are the "first" to do something, this is an episode that you do not want to miss!

| | In Episode 03 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has a timely conversation with Karen Jackson, a 4-time Breast Cancer Survivor and the Founder of Sisters Network Inc. In light of Breast Cancer Awareness Month, Karen candidly discusses her personal journey of becoming a Breast Cancer survivor 4 times! Borne from her personal cancer journey, was her interest in helping other women who sought a network of support and information for Black women. Through this Episode, listeners will be inspired to be proactive about their own health and to become your own biggest champion in the face of life's obstacles, health-related or otherwise. Exciting Upcoming Episodes Include:

* Beto O'Rourke, Former U.S. Presidential Candidate & Congressman; Founder of Powered By People
* Dr. Roger Mitchell, Chief Medical Examiner of Washington, D.C. & Deputy Mayor of Washington, D.C.
* Lex Frieden, author of the Americans with Disabilities Act
* Lauren Anderson, first Black principal ballerina for Houston Ballet; One of the first Black Women to serve as a Principal Ballet Dancer in the United States
* Hon. Curtis Graves, Civil Rights Leader & Former Texas State House Representative

Borne from her personal cancer journey, was her interest in helping other women who sought a network of support and information for Black women. Through this Episode, listeners will be inspired to be proactive about their own health and to become your own biggest champion in the face of life's obstacles, health-related or otherwise. Exciting Upcoming Episodes Include: Beto O'Rourke, Former U.S. Presidential Candidate & Congressman; Founder of Powered By People Dr. Roger Mitchell, Chief Medical Examiner of Washington, D.C. & Deputy Mayor of Washington, D.C. Lex Frieden, author of the Americans with Disabilities Act Lauren Anderson, first Black principal ballerina for Houston Ballet; One of the first Black Women to serve as a Principal Ballet Dancer in the United States Hon. Curtis Graves, Civil Rights Leader & Former Texas State House Representative | | | | | | ON THE ISSUES: BLACK MATERNAL MORTALITY In light of the staggering rates of maternal mortality impacting Black Women, we must act now to support Black women to have healthy pregnancies and deliveries. To learn more about these issues and how to get involved, please check out my Blavity Op-Ed by clicking below: | | | | == Black Maternal Mortality Why We must Act Now to Protect Black Mothers. == blavity.com | | | | | UNTIL NEXT TIME Please stay tuned for the official launch of the Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization coming soon. For more information, please visit == | | == | | | Sincerely, Amanda K. Edwards | | | | For More Updates, Follow my Social Media by Clicking on the Links Here | == == == == | Paid for by Amanda Edwards | | Amanda Edwards | PO Box 66684, Houston, TX 77266 | | Sent by mailto:akedwards00@yahoo.com

name: Team Inslee
subject: Our opponent is on the air
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This just got interesting.
| Friend, Did you see Jay's note? We're officially on the air -- but so is our opponent, Loren Culp. His ad could reach millions of voters, and if the Republican Governors Association jumps in, we could be drowned out. We have to get out the facts to Washington voters RIGHT NOW as they're filling out their ballots. Can you help? **[Donate $5 or more before our FINAL mid-month deadline on Friday to keep our ads on the air as voters begin voting in Washington state!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12856?t=3&akid=8190%2E868730%2EkRg9Hq)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12857?t=4&akid=8190%2E868730%2EkRg9Hq)

From: Jay Inslee
Date: Mon, Oct 13, 2020
Subject: Voters start voting this week. Here's how we reach them:
[](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=11&akid=8190%2E868730%2EkRg9Hq)
Friend,
This week, we start to vote in Washington state.
Washington state has led the nation in vote-by-mail, so we're used to an election "season" versus an election "day." But with voting about to begin, we have to reach voters _right now_.
Luckily, my campaign ads went up recently on TV and online across the state. But now, we need the funds to keep them up on air: This is the final stretch, and my opponent, Loren Culp, went up last week with his first ad that is misleading about me and my record, while downplaying his extreme viewpoints and divisive rhetoric.
_With an opponent like that, we can't predict what's going to come next -- we have to be prepared._
**[We need to raise $50,000 by Friday's FINAL mid-month deadline of this campaign: Will you donate $5 or more today to ensure our message is reaching Washington voters as they begin voting?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12856?t=12&akid=8190%2E868730%2EkRg9Hq)**

| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTjmzvUQXTf-mqhcEodT9vU0PwvRVcDzjggARObmKanZTqGUdwr-LCKbqzw2RL7FJ1Y3egs_fbtE2_IEn7CGCc_T_f-aMSdnk_N0pRoGovoi8lYVFXcgjB7mgwAdNvtmQyI-uj6hcvYV8Xrg0NJFrjMlhpx7zPG7ulaZNdkFzEOO4/360/wOGSloHRQWaxSd2SnoBn6g/h0/ZfMRC7ouapxQVRYxditopDcAi9O_q4U10w7FTP88puc) Team —

[New research](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEV7X85Y7Em9VHPYcX4KdlVaQdflK7CTCZ5vayxqITY7gZaQISP0I5wdaL26Hbqk8qACawgYv536wsNZn6EaqjO_Tf0bN5tFXSgRg7dVbedkMvWrBDrgdQd-KU8fAk6KUeJf7mKk5A-kyzY8uxFcVBHctTz6O-KWh06o_mYZoa54ikCS1m78Mj1_JRdx0GZPKhVi5rFVrWvernbEnCAJvbSixxDqYVeKQ4ZX7pgpc7a2uj5z3TqW2bPhWNbD3Q9KEhEty3arl0rtJ3uYvOxmz5J3R8biXlbRD_iH0f7rNYa5emVqtjZYbhEE-AGY6XHq9_VzL44HLiXMgoYMQ6IBahxm2ElAs_8qtklQXqZrSrpVFXumsMLpWWflBByvCT9EQz3vhAKveWdwalhe6FT4OZo/360/wOGSloHRQWaxSd2SnoBn6g/h1/5Rm06KA605u7yqJfdJiSDJoPE3yXtvUP31lJ5g_iwls) released on Monday shows that Facebook users are engaging with false and misleading content **three times as much today as they were in the lead up to the 2016 election**.

Over the four years that followed Donald Trump’s 2016 victory, we assumed work was diligently being done in the background to ensure that what we saw in 2016 would never again be repeated.

**We were wrong.**

Facebook, still the most popular social media platform by a significant margin, has comprehensively failed to protect the community from the insidious spread of disinformation.
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkUTY_VcmntRCLwzOZzDo03zYYAxcGo0JsWG6faJ2LDThyvinuuJEN3GnYUnPf4c7dPpv8De42f6LXLqJf3SQlJ0XOYwBsg7lComHDD_jQh8C9l0igd76SuuCYjLVcqvWafrkWcFUJA1PaKOytA3Wdd3-BgQOvv1W8o7iR-rdGN0oxC0XyyJlkhI0EEZg7ok8vObhtCXQzM3819dTZ2RNHm7vZpfp63wBhOh_2Em8McG0J0sWql7yUOGvGKbG1CYn6RwZO_X7vyWPywezm8UjfgjRIYZP419hddc62vELA1PDdnLfeHY6v8aLQlY_oBuCeRr5RU6jcbQlfOZKljWlnQE/360/wOGSloHRQWaxSd2SnoBn6g/h2/bNjkWm_WrtsG00Rwu_5k8keLFgQeyXu0mCmO9uv5pDY) **Now, more than ever, we need your help to push back against the wave of disinfo that is threatening our democracy.**

When we began our work, we chose **disinfo** as our niche, and it even became our namesake. As much now as we did then, we believe that effectively defeating Trump’s manipulation machine is synonymous with defeating Trump the candidate.

**Friend, If you haven’t involved yourself in this election, now is the time to deploy your resources, and there is no better use of those resources than to disarm Trump’s greatest weapon.**

When you make a contribution today, **you lend your hand directly to that aim**. Through our outreach, backed by your support, you turn the ears of undecided voters against online mistruths. **You move the needle in this election, you fight disinformation, and you protect American democracy**.

body:
My notes
[_DEFEND THE SENATE MAJORITY_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G3nDO7anuW_Szu30Dr6QS0nJoavaz05Pt-Md53oCPgieUBnG-p1oqAAXYo535dPCc-_SlQ0cQKtXj5yT2JtFUILWxuwxBYdSOCZgtj1m4CltfzA_GQFajcYxI8-zRckDpcjCLydPhU8V-F3qrv3rcTBrtzwlrdmNYgYUjazZvk4cEVxTO1l5w0jAH9TGyH7QFKsXldNoGp_NJ-RMtKPrbPmwF8EtvxoYnWfarfmqSuvZDSsocFkrWg_Fgzai4C8CspQMxA0YdccDwS-pLrcF2SzxSr-L4gzbqJtpxR-cjhIJk9JcNpjeprY8ZgCGkPtyP0a9XdcbbIj6uh02G8g_8lV3L9CeXF2kbCzXxShndraTsIcAvECuvqDU-YJYErLl4zQWd98mJvlEKwOIP663es87QFBl4Sh4&c=WaiIiUShmI0s6D6JieN4edS838jIZBWJNllY7PNFmR4km8ZG6QZIeQ==&ch=RmYA_Tq8MHeLsMh0_juX-JdXjENZHL5Vf_jDLNf60zcX7oxm-fEISQ==)
---
Friend, I just must show you this. I'm so glad to see what Susan Collins has said about her campaign in a recent Politico article.
Of the millions of dollars in negative advertising being spent to ruin her good name Sen. Collins had this to say:
_" It's very frustrating because it's backed by so much money. And it's been going on for two years now: Non-stop negative ads. That eventually it pulls you down," Collins said of the campaign against her. "**What's amazing is that I 'm still going to win.**" _
**That is the Susan Collins I know and respect: fiery, smart, level headed and grounded.**
[_SUPPORT SUSAN TODAY_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G3nDO7anuW_Szu30Dr6QS0nJoavaz05Pt-Md53oCPgieUBnG-p1oqAAXYo535dPCc-_SlQ0cQKtXj5yT2JtFUILWxuwxBYdSOCZgtj1m4CltfzA_GQFajcYxI8-zRckDpcjCLydPhU8V-F3qrv3rcTBrtzwlrdmNYgYUjazZvk4cEVxTO1l5w0jAH9TGyH7QFKsXldNoGp_NJ-RMtKPrbPmwF8EtvxoYnWfarfmqSuvZDSsocFkrWg_Fgzai4C8CspQMxA0YdccDwS-pLrcF2SzxSr-L4gzbqJtpxR-cjhIJk9JcNpjeprY8ZgCGkPtyP0a9XdcbbIj6uh02G8g_8lV3L9CeXF2kbCzXxShndraTsIcAvECuvqDU-YJYErLl4zQWd98mJvlEKwOIP663es87QFBl4Sh4&c=WaiIiUShmI0s6D6JieN4edS838jIZBWJNllY7PNFmR4km8ZG6QZIeQ==&ch=RmYA_Tq8MHeLsMh0_juX-JdXjENZHL5Vf_jDLNf60zcX7oxm-fEISQ==)
---
Susan is a fighter and wicked smart deal cutter. She's not in Washington D.C. for the fancy dinners or exclusive events or notoriety... Susan Collins puts her name and energy on the line every day to make Maine and the United States a better place. And she's darn good at it!
**Here is another snippet from the article that I thought was noteworthy:**
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G3nDO7anuW_Szu30Dr6QS0nJoavaz05Pt-Md53oCPgieUBnG-p1oqAAXYo535dPCc-_SlQ0cQKtXj5yT2JtFUILWxuwxBYdSOCZgtj1m4CltfzA_GQFajcYxI8-zRckDpcjCLydPhU8V-F3qrv3rcTBrtzwlrdmNYgYUjazZvk4cEVxTO1l5w0jAH9TGyH7QFKsXldNoGp_NJ-RMtKPrbPmwF8EtvxoYnWfarfmqSuvZDSsocFkrWg_Fgzai4C8CspQMxA0YdccDwS-pLrcF2SzxSr-L4gzbqJtpxR-cjhIJk9JcNpjeprY8ZgCGkPtyP0a9XdcbbIj6uh02G8g_8lV3L9CeXF2kbCzXxShndraTsIcAvECuvqDU-YJYErLl4zQWd98mJvlEKwOIP663es87QFBl4Sh4&c=WaiIiUShmI0s6D6JieN4edS838jIZBWJNllY7PNFmR4km8ZG6QZIeQ==&ch=RmYA_Tq8MHeLsMh0_juX-JdXjENZHL5Vf_jDLNf60zcX7oxm-fEISQ==)
**Susan is the toughest, most tenacious, most resilient and most durable member of the Senate. She is quite literally under attack 24/7 and continues to lead an incredible campaign. Chuck Schumer has openly admitted that he is targeting Susan Collins and doing everything he can to oust her from Congress and she still remains grounded and strong. **
Susan needs a huge influx of support TODAY. Her team is trying to buy valuable airtime on television to sway the 12% of undecided voters to become Team Collins members.

clean_body: My notes == Friend, I just must show you this. I'm so glad to see what Susan Collins has said about her campaign in a recent Politico article. Of the millions of dollars in negative advertising being spent to ruin her good name Sen. Collins had this to say: " It's very frustrating because it's backed by so much money. And it's been going on for two years now: Non-stop negative ads. That eventually it pulls you down," Collins said of the campaign against her. "What's amazing is that I 'm still going to win." That is the Susan Collins I know and respect: fiery, smart, level headed and grounded. == Susan is a fighter and wicked smart deal cutter. She's not in Washington D.C. for the fancy dinners or exclusive events or notoriety... Susan Collins puts her name and energy on the line every day to make Maine and the United States a better place. And she's darn good at it! Here is another snippet from the article that I thought was noteworthy: == Susan is the toughest, most tenacious, most resilient and most durable member of the Senate. She is quite literally under attack 24/7 and continues to lead an incredible campaign. Chuck Schumer has openly admitted that he is targeting Susan Collins and doing everything he can to oust her from Congress and she still remains grounded and strong. Susan needs a huge influx of support TODAY. Her team is trying to buy valuable airtime on television to sway the 12% of undecided voters to become Team Collins members. == == == Susan's team is buying a major advertising spot this Monday. Can I count on you? == The Left is so motivated to remove Trump and stick it to Senate Republicans that they're sending cash in boatloads to any candidate with a "D" next to their name. We cannot let radical Democrats buy the Senate Majority and force their socialist agenda on the American people. We are fighting for the future of our great nation and handing it over to Schumer, Pelosi, Bernie and AOC will guarantee disaster. name: Carlos Gimenez
subject: Why We Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlos Gimenez for Congress
body:
%%First Name%%, I wanted to talk to you about why I'm in this fight.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tf6wGwZPfvW2rXn5Op0LtKHEL878b9q6RXT1QPL2Che5bfqTYhFC2XWQoBYFAE85XYM2VbvktXe1WWFST7vT9-PUBoicMBYa_w5RD20VuI2AHcCrkp6jXzQlV1ZAU6Zs7ygExVYHtMBzJTCs0-hZixgwth7KwEi_y2Rm-Vo3pKjuo-BRqhuRWIxoSRvvRhZFvySIw7PLTsP65xrO9s4Al8vnGKWj9ROmu6jZkjMXuRxKLEWEdd5nT1Mp2n2QnzchC4WzrMRVTxcUYkDthA-yS8xSLqbpHWgVNnpWER-ShOupEK2zhbxdTe84GvXD84i83akqt67DbohLnNDzLvBSwVRSGfG1qyrVyUGqlgP0CuCxfL08Bvp2PNQ17wohcF60XHPcPx2aWs42OLCGgYcBz_LhQyScKDRUCpTOtj8EnqE=&c=jQ052JK9yRjiDoWBc_JjCu-GZCW-5tr_sJlbpj8Fbz6ZQHxCPmzx9A==&ch=SG9Uwh9B95W9wcDzgdiTMyO2yCR7y7khJJhP9-my8sPnGVSMtoLxIw==) Friend,

I'm the luckiest person in the world -- I've been privileged to serve my community my entire life. And I'm glad I've been able to give **SO MUCH BACK** to the country that I love.

As a child, I escaped Cuba with my family in search of a better life -- and we found that here in South Florida. **I raised a family,_children and grandchildren_ , and worked hard to achieve the American Dream.**

That's why I ran for Mayor in 2011, and that's why, as Mayor, **giving the same opportunities to the next generation has been my sole focus.**

**I 'm proud of what I accomplished:**
* I balanced a budget of %8.9 billion **8 YEARS in a ROW**
* Cut taxes by **$1,700 PER HOUSEHOLD**
* Saved the taxpayers **$400,000,000.00+** in wasteful spending
* Fought for **transparency and accountability.**

[HELP CARLOS FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM IN CONGRESS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tf6wGwZPfvW2rXn5Op0LtKHEL878b9q6RXT1QPL2Che5bfqTYhFC2XWQoBYFAE85XYM2VbvktXe1WWFST7vT9-PUBoicMBYa_w5RD20VuI2AHcCrkp6jXzQlV1ZAU6Zs7ygExVYHtMBzJTCs0-hZixgwth7KwEi_y2Rm-Vo3pKjuo-BRqhuRWIxoSRvvRhZFvySIw7PLTsP65xrO9s4Al8vnGKWj9ROmu6jZkjMXuRxKLEWEdd5nT1Mp2n2QnzchC4WzrMRVTxcUYkDthA-yS8xSLqbpHWgVNnpWER-ShOupEK2zhbxdTe84GvXD84i83akqt67DbohLnNDzLvBSwVRSGfG1qyrVyUGqlgP0CuCxfL08Bvp2PNQ17wohcF60XHPcPx2aWs42OLCGgYcBz_LhQyScKDRUCpTOtj8EnqE=&c=jQ052JK9yRjiDoWBc_JjCu-GZCW-5tr_sJlbpj8Fbz6ZQHxCPmzx9A==&ch=SG9Uwh9B95W9wcDzgdiTMyO2yCR7y7khJJhP9-my8sPnGVSMtoLxIw==)

Now, I'm running for Congress **for the same exact reasons.** We must preserve the American Dream that so many feel is out of their reach. As Lincoln said, America is the world's "last best hope." _**and we can 't quit on her, not now, not ever.**_
[HELP CARLOS FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM IN CONGRESS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tf6wGwZPfvW2rXn5Op0LtKHEL878b9q6RXT1QPL2Che5bfqTYhFC2XWQoBYFAE85XYM2VbvktXe1WWFST7vT9-PUBoicMBYa_w5RD20VuI2AHcCrkp6jXzQlV1ZAU6Zs7ygExVYHtMBzJTCs0-hZixgwth7KwEi_y2Rm-Vo3pKjuo-BRqhuRWIxoSRvvRhZFvySIw7PLTsP65xrO9s4Al8vnGKWj9ROmu6jZkjMXuRxKLEWEdd5nT1Mp2n2QnzchC4WzrMRVTxcUYkDthA-yS8xSLqbpHWgVNnpWER-ShOupEK2zhbxdTe84GvXD84i83akqt67DbohLnNDzLvBSwVRSGfG1qyrVyUGqlgP0CuCxfL08Bvp2PNQ17wohcF60XHPcPx2aWs42OLCGgYcBz_LhQyScKDRUCpTOtj8EnqE=&c=jQ052JK9yRjiDoWBc_JjCu-GZCW-5tr_sJlbpj8Fbz6ZQHxCPmzx9A==&ch=SG9Uwh9B95W9wcDzgdiTMyO2yCR7y7khJJhP9-my8sPnGVSMtoLxIw==)

Victory in November will take everything we have. My opponent is prepared to spend MILLIONS against our campaign, **and we have to start gaining ground against her if we stand any chance of success** \-- that starts by ACHIEVING our fundraising goal that expires in just TWO DAYS.

[**Can we count on you to join my fight for the American dream?**](http://)

Thanks for all of your help,

Mayor Carlos Gimenez

Miami, FL 33174

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20McCarver=20=2D=20Team=20Dani?=
subject: We NEED Your Help This Weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cf4bc989d928/we-need-your-help-this-weekend?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello #TeamDani!

We've got less than 3 weeks until Election Day, and we know this race is going to come down to the wire. Every last vote in this election counts, which is why **we need your help to reach out to voters this weekend. **

Can we count on you to make calls to voters and help us unseat Adam Kinzinger? [Click here to sign up to make some calls!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=3bce451f49&e=140a9b81e7) Even if you have never phonebanked before, our team will be on standby in a Zoom room to help you out with any questions or complications you have. We'll be there to make sure you have everything you need!

We need to be able to reach thousands of voters this weekend so we don't fall short of our goals, and we're counting on you to help us get there. With your help, we can finish strong!

Dave McCaver
Team Dani

P.S. We also need volunteers for Election Day! If you want to help us out on Election Day by helping to pass out lit or call last-minute voters, [sign up here.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6d5a58ae09&e=140a9b81e7)

body:
I want to say that I did everything I could to stop it.
| Friend,
---
We lost two Texas Republican congressional seats in 2018, because our candidates were outraised by the Democrats.
---
So it deeply troubles me that my socialist opponent outraised me during the third FEC quarter -- especially after I only won this seat with 51.1% of the vote in 2018.
---
**If we lose this seat in Austin after we already lost GOP seats in Dallas and Houston, we could lose _all_ of Texas.**
---
Tonight is our final public fundraising deadline with the FEC, and our chance to fight back and take back the fundraising lead. We cannot get outraised again.

clean_body: I want to say that I did everything I could to stop it. | Friend, We lost two Texas Republican congressional seats in 2018, because our candidates were outraised by the Democrats. So it deeply troubles me that my socialist opponent outraised me during the third FEC quarter -- especially after I only won this seat with 51.1% of the vote in 2018. If we lose this seat in Austin after we already lost GOP seats in Dallas and Houston, we could lose all of Texas. Tonight is our final public fundraising deadline with the FEC, and our chance to fight back and take back the fundraising lead. We cannot get outraised again. == == Thank you, == Rep. Michael McCaul Texas' 10th Congressional District \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Michael McCaul Date: Mon, Oct 12, 2020 Subject: Final FEC deadline == Friend, I just learned that last quarter, I was OUTRAISED by my socialist opponent. The idea that we could lose Texas to socialism all because we were outraised by Hollywood megadonors sickens me. We 're running out of time to close the fundraising gap, so I called up some loyal Texas patriots and asked them to MATCH contributions ahead of the upcoming FINAL FEC deadline on 10/14. As it stands, we're still $98,095 behind on our goal. If we get outraised again, Pelosi could very well buy this district just like she bought two Texas GOP districts in 2018. == == Thank you, == Rep. Michael McCaul Texas' 10th Congressional District 815 A Brazos Street, PMB 230, Austin, Texas 78701 Paid for by McCaul for Congress Contributions to McCaul for Congress, Inc. are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Team Kathy
subject: Majority Leader Steny H. Hoyer is coming to town (virtually of course!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Let's bring it home.
|
---

| | We have less than 30 days to maintain the House majority, flip the U.S. Senate, and elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House. All of this is possible with voter turnout in North Carolina's 6th Congressional District! Majority Leader Steny H. Hoyer understands just how important North Carolina is this Fall and has set aside time to join us for a special virtual reception in support of Kathy Manning's campaign. Here are the facts:
* Kathy isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money.
* The Republicans are pumping millions of dollars into North Carolina to help elect Trump and his allies.
* Kathy's race is one of the top pick up opportunities in the country this year.

We'll be honest, the crisis at the United States Postal Service, the coronavirus pandemic, and the economic uncertainty facing our communities, highlight the need for strong leaders like Kathy Manning who can work to build consensus, protect our families, and get things done for North Carolinians. **Join Kathy Manning and Majority Leader Steny H. Hoyer for a special virtual event as we work to flip North Carolina blue! ** [_**Click here to RSVP!**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d267/3d199a51/2f8d2617/73649dbf/901071077/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmhoyer20") Below, you'll find our invitation. Even if you cannot attend, please chip in to our efforts today. [](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d267/3d199a51/2f8d2617/73649dbf/901071077/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmhoyer20") We are looking forward to (virtually!) seeing you soon! Team Kathy [**Click here to RSVP.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d267/3d199a51/2f8d2617/73649dbf/901071077/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmhoyer20") **For more information contact Sean@KathyManningForNC.com** |
---

---

---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: This is going to be close
body:
Our campaign is just short of the $230,000 we need to raise before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to make our final FEC reporting deadline.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397471-935818-5242815-3452211cad-8df57bb0ab)

Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397471-935818-5242815-3452211cad-8df57bb0ab) Our campaign is **just short of the $230,000 we need** to raise before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to make our final FEC reporting deadline.

[**Will you come through for this campaign with a gift of $10 or more right away?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397471-935818-5242816-24ea8bd5c7-8df57bb0ab)

[**Please pitch in $10, $25, or even $50 right away to help this campaign win.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397471-935818-5242815-3452211cad-8df57bb0ab)

This campaign has blown past every expectation we’ve ever set. We’ve shocked the political establishment again and again and again.

Right now, we’re winning over new voters here in Florida... and we’re surging among Republicans.

We have all the tools we need to win... but **we need this final $230,000 to make the strongest case possible to the people of Florida**.

We’ve come so far together, Patriot--I _know_ you won’t let us fall short this late in the game.

[**Can I count on you for a gift of $10 to help us make our $230,000 goal before midnight tonight?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397471-935818-5242816-24ea8bd5c7-8df57bb0ab)

[**Make your most generous donation of $10, $25, or even $50 right away to help me win.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397471-935818-5242815-3452211cad-8df57bb0ab)

Thanks for your help!

Laura Loomer

name: Anna Paulina Luna, me (2)
subject: re: tonight will decide everything
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| Friend, this is it.
---
Tonight is our final public fundraising deadline with the Federal Election Commission.
---
Last year, I was just a political outsider and Air Force veteran who wanted to serve my country again.
---
Since then, we've won the Republican primary despite censorship from the Left, outraised Charlie Crist TWICE, and forced him to increase his staff and ask Biden for help to save his campaign.
---
_**But now is our make-or-break moment. If we miss this deadline and let Charlie Crist outraise us, our momentum will be shot.**_
---
_We 've set our goal based on what we project Crist to raise -- and right now, we're still $13,880 behind with just hours to go until the deadline with the FEC._
---
[**Please make a contribution before the FINAL FEC deadline at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT -- and I 'll unlock a 4X-MATCH for the next 35 minutes to help give us a boost at this do-or-die moment for our campaign.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lslxWuvuT8esshzHOmtuoKgedrBxWgy1h_ifudg1lgwJnHgJsB5i-M5HM82GvUH4IB7NPsq9CorggM9F6D2Yqj4tRLLRzbpu1aJQh6CNgeykR8l6w0c9fXsdlpwt-iYrray8fL5uHSDaCVpDwZtBX3kGbivwWi_MM9ji7nJEFfuIDj1JVKGJsVF_KWPsGNqJisHtRXARDw3nl-46xYU1Nrh8MbOferQ0CWNAH5uy6W5NB9O7NwJFYJDZuQk5xFEh3M1phMF59ZMRMCnJVOLygS7eKo2D1Yzm6I7GepNrTkoUu81uI6j7g==&c=a6n9-90um5I_BokQCKTe4JyT7VpULbxqeAnNzbkmO2uopnx_40MglQ==&ch=cQZcTWI7ezytz6046AGG4HphcLJnfiOtBoEuu0wDMn9DxI2V6WRH7Q==)

## **CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT 36 UPDATE**
Erin Cruz has been featured yet again on a major media outlet sharing her positions on the issues as the election draws near. [In her most recent feature, on October 12, 2020, Mrs. Cruz exposes the truth behind the big hearings Ruiz touted in Washington D.C. on the Salton Sea](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=187613.655.1.71b6006d59256d6a9fe272fe3f9479fe), and the California connection to big and _very bad_ back door deals being made behind the backs of residents. Ruiz looks to be in cahoots with his long time friend Assemblyman Garcia. Just a week before the California deal was struck and bill was passed in the California State Assembly, Ruiz finished a set of hearings relating to the Salton Sea, touting child "safety" and "health." Not once did he mention or talk about the impending California Legislation that would put literally millions of Californians at risk. Not once did he mention the huge new deal for Dirty Lithium Mining at the Salton Sea, which Gavin Newsom has signed into law. The bill allows foreign and national big interests to mine. The interests involved in the current lithium mining "deal" include an [Australian entity, Bloomberg, Bezos, and Bill Gates](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=187613.656.1.4ba6cb74b52c254c24d107637cf0638c). Drilling and mining for dangerous, non renewable lithium holds extremely high risk for poisoning our groundwater and endangering our farms and farmers, putting our children, families, and our environment at imminent risk for contamination - for generations. We deserve better. Ruiz has been silent. In addition to the above press, we have started a "press page" on our website where you will more easily be able to find and share #TeamCruz press coverage. To see the Interview [CLICK HERE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=187613.657.1.cae96ec1ddb5b135039d453d416280ba). To learn more about Erin Cruz for Congress go to erincruz.org **###**
---

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: 20 days and counting - here’s how you can help!
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](http://truethevote.activehosted.com/p_v.php?l=20&c=266&m=572&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38)

---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | Dear Friend,

Early in-person voting has already begun in 15 states!

Arizona, California, Georgia, Illinois, Kansas, Kentucky, Minnesota, Nebraska, Ohio, Rhode Island, Tennessee, Texas, Vermont, Virginia, and Wyoming have already kicked things off, with more to come.

GET OUT AND VOTE EARLY! The best way to ensure your vote counts in this election is to vote early in person at the polls. Check to see if your state offers early voting at a polling place. You can find [State-by-State Voter Guides](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=266A572A20A2635) on True the Vote's In Your State page. Each state infographic lists important voter information, including when to vote, how to vote, and what to bring with you to the polls. Download, print, and share it with others!

We continue to say it – in this election, JUST VOTING IS NOT ENOUGH! Poll watchers can help increase confidence in the integrity of elections. If you are willing and able to serve, many counties still need poll watchers to oversee the election process and can be placed all the way up to Election Day. Call your local Party or a candidate to get involved. Visit our [In Your State](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=266A572A20A2635) page for Party contact information. Ask to be connected with whoever is overseeing the Ballot Security effort and let them know you are willing to serve! You can also check out our supplemental [training for election workers](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0dHYudGVhY2hhYmxlLmNvbSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=266A572A20A2638).

We encourage you to [watch our powerful infomercial](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ5b3V0dS5iZSUyRi0yU1RvMlR0dnRn&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=266A572A20A2636) documenting what's at stake in this election. Click below for a 2-minute clip.
---
| | [ ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ5b3V0dS5iZSUyRnZNMnRCeS1Bb1Fr&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=266A572A20A2637)
---
| |
We are all in this together! On behalf of everyone at True the Vote and more than 100,000 volunteers across the country, thank you for your commitment to election integrity!

Onward!

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

P.S. True the Vote is scaling fast. Demand is overwhelming. We need your help to ensure a safe and secure election. If you can, please consider supporting our cause by clicking the link below.

---
| | [ Please Donate to the Cause ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19ob21lXzYyNDIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=266A572A20A2631)
---
| |

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=61274acd470e43fc92a7b8f704b01834&_e=fFFIwUl9YmHoS06Vws30ZfhgccenC90vxVsr7p2Vo-YOx_NxbLIykD3MNWFgsK_TI_rfYj9NB5H1mbhMZjIHbt38tn0Nscd1fgkroXYFNjiEuj3hX0sEGDAj8DRpymExH8POoptap3w-sQTPoXi2giEO007ofMVJ7opNkVsrZHXI1VhFGynUWMpGT48ZBrATV3VbwHsL4MZAzDJAnYxn9nIrypNIvpDXExwvXOpntT3szVaeTw7vYa-YZsTzH7rGAoiyIPXDl2_vvBR-GJdyQjGB4zWY_w_bwivM2w_Xsljf0Lguo9hFGxNydd6967o_2cDp_EjyP3HAIPO4zMrHu79IUOjwHwxJ0vcTZRdh1N2CZFKCA9ra1E9wRRm1Wd-xyNEmKspVx1xB1L0h6hWHPaSA8Qz8yjByBITgCsopToQ%3D)
---
Hey Friend,

I’m going to cut right to the chase.

We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. **[Can you step up and donate before midnight to help us fight off the Left?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=61274acd470e43fc92a7b8f704b01834&_e=fFFIwUl9YmHoS06Vws30ZfhgccenC90vxVsr7p2Vo-YOx_NxbLIykD3MNWFgsK_TI_rfYj9NB5H1mbhMZjIHbt38tn0Nscd1fgkroXYFNjiEuj3hX0sEGDAj8DRpymExH8POoptap3w-sQTPoXi2giEO007ofMVJ7opNkVsrZHXI1VhFGynUWMpGT48ZBrATLlkFNh7InZ4ebQ4VFjPbbw33oHMQl-j7LtG7vX9VZm3YRRvXm0k5dKBYk9ekFANKhXRDFo4HtDYdJyOufF6-Qp8SO_uhWkWxePv9KjCTGnC_iR2PptYWmOVX6wK7tuo_bdzlUfVsXAO5KgwT8pdrDcOHeL630KwAtzYzTH_L89wPglVaX1Ry4i5oIu6V6qGU7TfQJ9KJSy-AlDThGNzknsJg_TIB1JQAMkLT9LoF0w0%3D)**

President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana.

It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. **[We need your help to hold the U.S. Senate majority.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=61274acd470e43fc92a7b8f704b01834&_e=fFFIwUl9YmHoS06Vws30ZfhgccenC90vxVsr7p2Vo-YOx_NxbLIykD3MNWFgsK_TI_rfYj9NB5H1mbhMZjIHbt38tn0Nscd1fgkroXYFNjiEuj3hX0sEGDAj8DRpymExH8POoptap3w-sQTPoXi2giEO007ofMVJ7opNkVsrZHXI1VhFGynUWMpGT48ZBrATcvZFU6dnX5RZ5aTL2DlMHDkC4QYrNs7EU9rc-F5KS_qgE8Fw2uhpQ-QonY0pqmGx_3dJBm4-XG1izGf12uBpqLwjMjT0Uop_BlwyJolMl2MX4sRWIBhuDEgrGF1BR8BVicM-aauScfYnhLK9xjxqp90U3-r7o3syl5xtm-U_VRk-2Jc8Z2-dFMawtO6DFPq0YyL6u2slS5_i5Y4eF56sVzNUh37ms9fqsZOlDh4GFmM%3D)**

| [**HELP US PROTECT THE SENATE MAJORITY ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=61274acd470e43fc92a7b8f704b01834&_e=fFFIwUl9YmHoS06Vws30ZfhgccenC90vxVsr7p2Vo-YOx_NxbLIykD3MNWFgsK_TI_rfYj9NB5H1mbhMZjIHbt38tn0Nscd1fgkroXYFNjiEuj3hX0sEGDAj8DRpymExH8POoptap3w-sQTPoXi2giEO007ofMVJ7opNkVsrZHXI1VhFGynUWMpGT48ZBrAT9kMTNdOA1eIeTMIWfesQzX3sHrNxRwRop4rzeRVnirSycve02a7r9TEZ6wqLYBUFPx410vlf9DzZnbuYbDM7Ewy1XpvcQ5mTqmT8h_Qe-CuI07iqSHS3DaeK77eOP9kgH0u97YAP4HhLLYlm0WK09J-IMV4khsNYdU8Wzbfd9iB0fbG35SrocLcRhTbZkRg8f2pjUlAamoGlEQRmbowLH7caGossV99UTWj6KPsLoAc%3D)
---

Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents.

The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help.

**[Please, do anything you can right now to support both of our critical re-elections. Without Steve, the Republican Senate majority is lost.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=61274acd470e43fc92a7b8f704b01834&_e=fFFIwUl9YmHoS06Vws30ZfhgccenC90vxVsr7p2Vo-YOx_NxbLIykD3MNWFgsK_TI_rfYj9NB5H1mbhMZjIHbt38tn0Nscd1fgkroXYFNjiEuj3hX0sEGDAj8DRpymExH8POoptap3w-sQTPoXi2giEO007ofMVJ7opNkVsrZHXI1VhFGynUWMpGT48ZBrATkG_0FWDzOLOo1qN6gZo3QIdjMtI59XbCRjQAxvhF2IhXVvZwQMCVdsF1GQYhnTWFk8lefeMMioI41u5QVosnUT51CistY4yH-d4G8I3Wh9NfONC4raUiBvv45Ra1TS5KfQ8gIqkFX0rrEKSMDviOfRC4P4v0VOKbgy1711DM6GTg2GVK9hjj_Dl2w4AR5AeQVtgDifVWczADd7W9mxysEmhFk5KzKw2zwriDOek3kGk%3D)**

[**STAND WITH STEVE DAINES AND LINDSEY GRAHAM ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=61274acd470e43fc92a7b8f704b01834&_e=fFFIwUl9YmHoS06Vws30ZfhgccenC90vxVsr7p2Vo-YOx_NxbLIykD3MNWFgsK_TI_rfYj9NB5H1mbhMZjIHbt38tn0Nscd1fgkroXYFNjiEuj3hX0sEGDAj8DRpymExH8POoptap3w-sQTPoXi2giEO007ofMVJ7opNkVsrZHXI1VhFGynUWMpGT48ZBrATOeMr88BjiBTnHNlrFfwiFB2Y5c8VBbquE-Gorrgqx-VYpV3Fn6ZXJ4Q8T_gdtPKyEAdpmIcgnuQMjX4DstydFRz5KY4MDED2QpdhbpudED50LV1Vv-AGJrHhq-7YUPHjamP9j8bxKOhzCa4tJPe48ZZaNKdFU2n4Zx5L2U2Njj_aqdWqy2JXsnsdya9-xOKfLtrdQaubrwgyuuXEJHn20y_ugZ-ljoGCiynZqcJ2us8%3D)
---

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **[The donation you make today will be split to help Steve Daines in Montana and my campaign in South Carolina.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=61274acd470e43fc92a7b8f704b01834&_e=fFFIwUl9YmHoS06Vws30ZfhgccenC90vxVsr7p2Vo-YOx_NxbLIykD3MNWFgsK_TI_rfYj9NB5H1mbhMZjIHbt38tn0Nscd1fgkroXYFNjiEuj3hX0sEGDAj8DRpymExH8POoptap3w-sQTPoXi2giEO007ofMVJ7opNkVsrZHXI1VhFGynUWMpGT48ZBrATObSyHkYohhxn-rp9xs1wRhQwevdF6laefdapbupB2lcbRTOzF08GzxVNy4rt2CwJG9kzZlradTiQm91Uj8KSWwUz_ThxHQlsQ6Vuyo9h7q_td82iAztRGymLmdHHYo02MH73WKMlOVp1ZoD9ipA1iH9iorNXy2PL2n8cwcHVj_iidQBcZtrHAtUsHDUg8-p9oJUwwPct6XDZn_xkIxPsqNPUCbgX-tkfMmsH6TGN0jA%3D)** Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help.

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=61274acd470e43fc92a7b8f704b01834&_e=fFFIwUl9YmHoS06Vws30ZfhgccenC90vxVsr7p2Vo-YOx_NxbLIykD3MNWFgsK_TI_rfYj9NB5H1mbhMZjIHbt38tn0Nscd1fgkroXYFNjiEuj3hX0sEGDAj8DRpymExH8POoptap3w-sQTPoXi2giEO007ofMVJ7opNkVsrZHXI1VhFGynUWMpGT48ZBrATf2dd33i6hbGhI6XWOlI94wEKcv4Zgn81NIMRAZUOX8TThn0xL6NTzI8RqGXkkEfaTQeNqrJgaEjvXWgAwsTsE8mz4GXOhOZYtvo3CXsymA5524Ad0E6aQgNHdWTDlH2CpiyzWxh1Rp07VScIr2hh6DZDVfCA3heyejG_Pw5ddNVT-o7dwDymZb-KyM_XQww2nSLOQ66NYVxb03H9cSU-CdU0mSaaV7uDBGN1toWudUc%3D)

body:
We just got some devastating news. Five Liberals in key Senate races raised a combined $150,000,000+ to DESTROY our pro-Trump allies. Experts are calling it a green tsunami!
Friend, We just got some devastating news. # _FINAL REPORTING PERIOD_
**It’s been a long race and now we are in the final hours. By now, you have received your ballot and hopefully filled it out and sent it in. (Don’t forget the down-ballot races)** **But unlike you, there are still many undecided voters who are waiting until the final moments of this cycle to make their decision. We need to reach them with the message and the plans that so many Montanans are behind- Lower drug prices, transparency in government, more insurance options with lower premiums...** **We are less than three weeks out. I really need your support. Will you help us ensure that our final showing is our strongest?_Please Donate Now. _**

body:

| Dear Friend,

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e899/77d4c309/21f1c2ca/2635a8ca/634818204/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e899/77d4c309/21f1c2ca/2635a8f5/634818204/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e899/77d4c309/21f1c2ca/2635a8f4/634818204/VEsHAw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

| | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: you can make a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
Look, winning Florida has been our top priority for 2020. Here's why:

* Whoever wins Florida usually wins the presidency.
* We've won two out of the last three presidential elections here and like always, it will be close!
* Trump and the GOP are trying to dismantle the USPS and suppress the vote, so we need to fight back to make sure Joe Biden is elected president.

[**The key is a big Democratic turnout in Florida in order to win the state. That 's why our Flip Florida Fund is working around the clock to reach voters in these final weeks. Can you pitch in $10 to our Flip Florida Fund now?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.%3D%3D/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-october20?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+The+key+is+a+big+Democratic+turnout+in+F&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_LO_201014_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_LO_201014_1_1&refcode=DWS_EM_FR_LO_201014_1_1")

We can send Trump packing by winning the state, but it's going to take a lot of caring dedicated people to pitch in.

We need to keep turning out voters ->**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.%3D%3D/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-october20?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=7+-+Help+us+make+a+difference+in+Florida+by+&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_LO_201014_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_LO_201014_1_1&refcode=DWS_EM_FR_LO_201014_1_1")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Democrats Are Asking Amy Coney Barrett to Violate Ruth Bader Ginsburg's Judicial Standard
body:
Democrats "seem bent on avoiding Barrett’s record—perhaps because they know it speaks for itself.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f6d52228bc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Democrats Are Asking Amy Coney Barrett to Violate Ruth Bader Ginsburg's Judicial Standard**

Senate Democrats know “that judicial nominees cannot and should not express their personal views on controversial political issues that could come before the courts. Doing so would make them appear biased and unable to do their job,” Kaylee McGhee writes in the _Washington Examiner._

“Democrats should instead use their time to ask Barrett questions about her past court opinions in which she has expressed her legal views.” But they “seem bent on avoiding Barrett’s record—perhaps because they know it speaks for itself.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=590149d17e&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE: **[**Barrett Asked to Hold up Notes She’s Using to Answer Questions. She Holds up a Blank Notepad.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e36db57c69&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| President Trump’s First Step Act “corrected many of the injustices of the Clinton Crime Bill and others,” Richard Johnson writes. Of the inmates the law helped, 91 percent have been Black and 98 percent are male. “Thousands of Black men are now back home because of President Trump’s policies. They’re being fathers, husbands, sons and brothers—restoring lives and families and communities.” Read more in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c624e4354c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Yesterday, President Trump “signed an executive order establishing the United States One Trillion Trees Interagency Council,” which “will not only expand on the recreational and economic benefits that forests provide our nation’s citizens but also work to improve the global environment for future generations,” White House Deputy Chief of Staff Chris Liddell writes for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=886b4fe662&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Federal customs officers working at a border crossing between California and the Mexican city of Tijuana seized 3,000 pounds of meth from a commercial truck, making it the second-largest bust in history on the United States-Mexico border,” Anna Giaritelli reports. “Smugglers will try every way possible to try and get their product across the border,” one border official said. Read more in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d865a4c84&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d846b3f37&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a8761a325&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=3c4a56ada6)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team Durbin
subject: stop Amy Coney Barrett
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Did you see Senator Durbin's message, Peter?
**[We need you in the fight to stop Senate Republicans' highly partisan Supreme Court confirmation process in its tracks. Add your name to the petition right now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff458f/42ab3cf4/664ffba9/135d1146/2553683546/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/stop-amy-coney-barrett?source=em201013i_1041&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
**[Sign the Petition](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff458f/42ab3cf4/664ffba9/135d1146/2553683546/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/stop-amy-coney-barrett?source=em201013i_1041&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
\---Original Message from Dick Durbin---
Peter,
Today, Senate Republicans are moving forward with their plan to confirm President Trump's nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, to the Supreme Court. As a member of the Judiciary Committee, I'll be seeking answers from this nominee about her views on issues like the Affordable Care Act.
Let's be clear: the main reason Republicans are pushing so hard to rush this confirmation is to install a Supreme Court Justice who will overturn the Affordable Care Act. We all need to keep speaking out to protect the integrity of the Supreme Court and the future of affordable health care, reproductive rights, and so much more. Will you join me in the fight?
**[Sign my petition to tell Republicans to stop this partisan confirmation hearing now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff458f/42ab3cf4/664ffba9/135d1146/2553683546/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/stop-amy-coney-barrett?source=em201013i_1041&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Election Day is just 22 days away. The American people should have their say in November before the Senate fills any vacancy on the Supreme Court. But Republicans don't want to wait -- flouting their own precedent from 2016 -- because they need a new Justice by November 10 to rule against the Affordable Care Act and strip coverage from millions of vulnerable Americans.
This is the moment for the people to make their voices heard, Peter.
**[Add your name now to join me in the fight to stop this confirmation.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff458f/42ab3cf4/664ffba9/135d1146/2553683546/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/stop-amy-coney-barrett?source=em201013i_1041&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

clean_body: Did you see Senator Durbin's message, Peter? "" "" \---Original Message from Dick Durbin--- Peter, Today, Senate Republicans are moving forward with their plan to confirm President Trump's nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, to the Supreme Court. As a member of the Judiciary Committee, I'll be seeking answers from this nominee about her views on issues like the Affordable Care Act. Let's be clear: the main reason Republicans are pushing so hard to rush this confirmation is to install a Supreme Court Justice who will overturn the Affordable Care Act. We all need to keep speaking out to protect the integrity of the Supreme Court and the future of affordable health care, reproductive rights, and so much more. Will you join me in the fight? "" Election Day is just 22 days away. The American people should have their say in November before the Senate fills any vacancy on the Supreme Court. But Republicans don't want to wait -- flouting their own precedent from 2016 -- because they need a new Justice by November 10 to rule against the Affordable Care Act and strip coverage from millions of vulnerable Americans. This is the moment for the people to make their voices heard, Peter. "" My best, Dick Durbin "" * Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

With less than two months until the Election, they are coming after me more viciously than EVER before. It's NEVER going to stop, which is why I'm counting on YOUR support during this critical time. For a short time, when you step up and contribute ANY AMOUNT, your gift will be 800%-MATCHED! See below. I can't offer this exclusive opportunity to everyone, so please, do not share this. That's right. Contribute ANY AMOUNT and it will be MATCHED by 800%. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 725 Fifth Ave New York, NY 10022 We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

name: Ethan
subject: Just so you know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
Hey Peter,
Betsy sent this e-mail earlier today to let you know about our deadline tonight, and why it's important we hit our goal. I just wanted to give you the full picture. In our media market, it would take roughly $50,000-$60,000 to run an ad on broadcast for a week. That's a lot of grassroots donations we need to raise to combat her opponent's new attack ad.
Her opponent has corporate PACs and big money on his side, but we've got folks like you. If you, and everyone else who is getting an email from me today, could donate just $10, we could level the playing field. I hope you can chip in $10, or whatever you able, to help us hit our goal tonight. [You can click here to make a donation.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiwAPefgGbx0tJrb880lvYT6-jVfRxqS5H5yf2GgaDI=/MH2zlRBzSul4iFYs62lU1O_bHw3ViMju67N1joLFVdE=?refcode=10.14)
Thanks so much for your support. We can do this. And we can do it right-- with people, not politics.
Sincerely,
Ethan
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Betsy Rader**
Date: Wed, Oct 14, 2020
Subject: Double your donation!
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

| | | |
---
---
Peter, Today is our final big fundraising report deadline before the election. And now is when we have to pay the bills for our final communications to voters. Election day 2020 is almost here and we need to close strong! Fortunately we have help** from a great supporter who is offering to match donations up to $1,000 today only, to help us hit our goal! ** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiwAPefgGbx0tJrb880lvYT6-jVfRxqS5H5yf2GgaDI=/MH2zlRBzSul4iFYs62lU1O_bHw3ViMju67N1joLFVdE=?refcode=10.14) A barrage of t.v. attack ads show that my opponent knows I can win this race, but the attacks also have required additional communication with voters to spread the truth. Ohio deserves better than politics as usual and we're getting a new t.v. ad up to communicate that message! **But that means we need to raise a lot more money before our deadline tonight**. That's why I need your support today. **[If you can donate $15 today, we 'll double your donation; you help us meet our goal; and together we fight these attacks.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiwAPefgGbx0tJrb880lvYT6-jVfRxqS5H5yf2GgaDI=/1Ue2mYVCOqgaj2oLvhGS3qqiieBrtE5bsT6xajpuMi0=?refcode=10.14&amount=15)** Thanks so much for your support, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiwAPefgGbx0tJrb880lvYT6-jVfRxqS5H5yf2GgaDI=/MH2zlRBzSul4iFYs62lU1O_bHw3ViMju67N1joLFVdE=?refcode=10.14&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiwAPefgGbx0tJrb880lvYT6-jVfRxqS5H5yf2GgaDI=/MH2zlRBzSul4iFYs62lU1O_bHw3ViMju67N1joLFVdE=?refcode=10.14&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiwAPefgGbx0tJrb880lvYT6-jVfRxqS5H5yf2GgaDI=/MH2zlRBzSul4iFYs62lU1O_bHw3ViMju67N1joLFVdE=?refcode=10.14&amount=25) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiwAPefgGbx0tJrb880lvYT6-jVfRxqS5H5yf2GgaDI=/MH2zlRBzSul4iFYs62lU1O_bHw3ViMju67N1joLFVdE=?refcode=10.14&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiwAPefgGbx0tJrb880lvYT6-jVfRxqS5H5yf2GgaDI=/MH2zlRBzSul4iFYs62lU1O_bHw3ViMju67N1joLFVdE=?refcode=10.14)

Friend —

Did you see my email this morning? I went on _Morning Joe_ to talk about the opportunity we have to flip this district from red to blue, deliver accountability to Washington, and act as a check on Trump contesting a legitimate election.

This is a pivotal moment in our campaign. With polling showing our race neck and neck and less than three weeks until Election Day, every moment counts -- and now, a group of supporters is matching every contribution you make through Sunday!

**That means your donation right now will have twice the impact.**

**[You’ve stepped up before, and I know I can count on you again. Let’s take advantage of this opportunity and raise the resources we need to win this campaign. Please, click here to watch my appearance on _Morning Joe_ and contribute what you can right now to power our campaign to victory!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20320353/256530333/2025614833?refcode2=3d460fef-6e0e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=29e58fc7-6e0e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=3d460fef-6e0e-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=101420-es-morning-joe-kicker-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDQ2MGZlZi02ZTBlLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6GbjlyN2CkH2SYvUGryg-aM0jU2WdSeWsVqFmscWqKI=)**

Let’s flip this seat from red to blue and deliver real change!

Margaret

Not only that, we can create positive change: From recovering from the pandemic, and building back our economy stronger than ever before, to protecting our land and water, and delivering accountability to Washington — I am ready to do the work.

That’s why I’m running for Congress, and why I’m in a statistical tie against seven-term incumbent Vern Buchanan. The people of the Suncoast and our nation want real change, and we can deliver it, together.

I’m grateful for your support.

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20320368/256530348/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDQ2MGZlZi02ZTBlLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6GbjlyN2CkH2SYvUGryg-aM0jU2WdSeWsVqFmscWqKI=)**
