name: Sara Gideon
subject: Will you make a contribution to support my campaign today? If you could make that donation before our final FEC deadline tonight it would send a powerful message about the strength of our grassroots campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
A new poll came out last week showing this race is a statistical tie. At this point in the race, that is far too close for comfort.
Hi there,
In just a minute, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is so important.
Tonight at midnight, we have our final FEC deadline of this entire campaign. This will be the last time we publicly report our fundraising numbers before election day -- so all eyes will be on us.
In addition, **a new poll came out last week showing this race is a statistical tie.** At this point in the race, that is far too close for comfort. That's why Senator Hassan suggested that I reach out.
Our campaign raises money differently. We're powering our work through tens of thousands of individual donations, people chipping in small donations when they can because they know how important it is to win this Senate seat and replace Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader.
I'm proud of that fact -- but it does mean I have to ask:
[**Will you split a contribution -- of any amount you can afford -- to support my campaign and Senator Hassan's today? If you can make that donation before our FEC deadline tonight it would send a powerful message about the strength of our grassroots campaign. **](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc68b/2a380d31/209e2153/f04eba/3703595272/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAxNF9NV0g0U0dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201014_MWH4SG_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Maggie Hassan and Sara GIdeon._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc68b/2a380d31/209e2153/f04ebb/3703595272/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAxNF9NV0g0U0dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201014_MWH4SG_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc68b/2a380d31/209e2153/f04ea4/3703595272/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAxNF9NV0g0U0dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201014_MWH4SG_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc68b/2a380d31/209e2153/f04ea5/3703595272/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAxNF9NV0g0U0dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201014_MWH4SG_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc68b/2a380d31/209e2153/f04eba/3703595272/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAxNF9NV0g0U0dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201014_MWH4SG_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
I wouldn't be asking if this were not so important. But we are in the final stretch before election day and rapidly running out of time to do the hard work we need to win. So this is an incredibly important request -- especially with our upcoming FEC deadline.
Thank you in advance for your contribution. I am working hard, every day, and it means a lot to know that we're in this together.
All my best,
Sara Gideon
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc68b/2a380d31/209e2153/f04eba/3703595272/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAxNF9NV0g0U0dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201014_MWH4SG_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: This week's hearings
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Now that there is another vacancy on the Supreme Court, it is my constitutional duty as the Chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee to fill the seat. And I intend to do just that. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)
---
Fellow American - I'll get straight to the point.

While I am chairing Senate Judiciary Committee hearings for President Trump's Supreme Court nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, I need your help.

I'm asking every conservative patriot who wants to #FillTheSeat to let me know you stand with me today **[by adding your name here:](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)**

**[#FillTheSeat](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)**
| [**Stand with Lindsey Graham ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)
---

My unwavering defense of Justice Brett Kavanaugh in 2018 made me the number one target of the Left. They went after my record and tried to destroy my character. Nothing was off limits.

My Democrat opponent Jaime Harrison has shattered fundraising records - _raising $57 million in the last three months from megadonors in California and New York_ - because I refused to allow the liberal mob to destroy the good name of Justice Kavanaugh.

And now that there is another vacancy on the Supreme Court, it is my constitutional duty as the Chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee to fill the seat. _**And I intend to fully exercise my constitutional obligation to do just that.**_

The vicious attacks against me have already started. The residents of South Carolina are being bombarded by ads every single day because I refuse to bend to the liberal mob.

**[That's why I need to know you have my back by making an immediate donation to help me lead the Resistance against the Democrats' unhinged attacks against me and President Trump.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)**

**[#FillTheSeat](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)**
[**Stand with Lindsey Graham ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)
---

I'm ready for a fight. The Democrats threw everything they had against me in 2018, and they're going to do it again in 2020. I can't lead this fight alone - **[are you with me?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)**

Sincerely,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)

Lindsey Graham
United States Senator

**[#FillTheSeat](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)**
[**Stand with Lindsey Graham ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580747:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)
---

* * *
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580748:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)
**Lindsey Graham is a fighter who doesn't back down from a challenge. He's a conservative who gets things done. He's a leader who puts our country above all!**

In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580748:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)
---

We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. To receive only the most important emails, please [click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580749:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r) We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osw9lgEKNV).

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580750:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580751:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580752:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56580753:sw9lgEKNV:m:1:877327319:5286EAA58C275EFB9D8512824ECDC099:r)
---|---|---|---

| Paid For By Team Graham, Inc.
---

| John Ratcliffe, the Director of National Intelligence, has recently declassified a number of documents that EXPOSE Hillary Clinton campaign's attempt to set up the appearance of a connection between the Trump Campaign and the Russian security services. While the connection was clearly manufactured, the Clinton campaign continued to attempt to obstruct the truth and deny reality.
Apparently, ex-CIA Director John Brennan briefed former President Barack Obama on the topic, making him complicit. Hillary Clinton's campaign was attempting to smear Donald Trump as a Russian foreign agent, and the CIA and President Obama knew about it!
We cannot accept this massive miscarriage of justice. We need to know the absolute truth about what happened in 2016 because something smells rotten! Matt will continue to seek out the truth and go after the guilty parties.
Now is our chance to flip the House red on November 3rd, and get to the bottom of this extended HOAX. If we are going to do this, we need your support to surge in the last few weeks of the campaign season. Because we don't accept corporate PAC money or exchange votes for cash, we are depending on patriots like you to fund our operations. name: Rainee Taylor, Evergreen Action
subject: Amy Coney Barrett's response on climate change is disqualifying
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
She's firmly unqualified.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=3671%2E53494%2ExSi7-N) Friend, During yesterday's marathon Supreme Court confirmation hearings, Amy Coney Barrett was asked a pretty softball question about climate change: "Have you read about that?" Her response: "I'm certainly not a scientist...I have read things about climate change. I would not say I have firm views on it." That answer alone is disqualifying. And here's why: While it's not a requirement that a Supreme Court justice be a scientist, it is a requirement that a justice be able to review evidence to make a decision. The scientific evidence of climate change is beyond reasonable doubt or debate. A nominee without "firm views" on climate science should be firmly viewed as unqualified for the Supreme Court. **The tens of millions of Americans who are already suffering today from the effects of climate-fueled wildfires and hurricanes cannot afford a climate denier on the Supreme Court.[On behalf of them and the millions more who will feel climate change's effects in the coming years, watch and then share Amy Coney Barrett's disqualifying response with your community today:](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1027?t=3&akid=3671%2E53494%2ExSi7-N)** | [SHARE ON TWITTER ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1026?t=4&akid=3671%2E53494%2ExSi7-N)
---
[SHARE ON FACEBOOK ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1027?t=5&akid=3671%2E53494%2ExSi7-N)
---
Thank you,
Rainee Taylor
Digital Strategist, Evergreen Action

clean_body: Maxine Waters has "represented" Los Angeles for 44 years, but things are so bad here that even she refuses to live in our district. | Peter - I'm Joe Collins, the Republican and Navy veteran running for Congress against Maxine Waters. You've probably seen my new ad "Mansion Maxine" on social media: Maxine Waters has "represented" Los Angeles for 44 years, but things are so bad here that even she refuses to live in our district. While Maxine sits in her out-of-district mansion, the rest of us have to live with the crime, violence, drugs, poverty and homelessness that her decades of failed radical policies have created. I'm running for Congress to undo the mess that Maxine Waters has created, When I turned 18, I joined the U.S. Navy. During my service, I was deployed to a combat zone during Operation Iraqi Freedom. But while I was away serving my country and fighting in a war, Maxine Waters couldn't even be bothered to fight for our own community. So when I returned home from war, it was our district that looked like a war zone. Los Angeles deserves better! America deserves better! I need your help to hold Maxine Waters accountable for her failed soclialist policies, fix the mess she's created in our community, and ensure what has happened in Los Angeles doesn't happen to the rest of our country. Thank you! Joe Collins U.S. Navy Veteran Republican for Congress | | Joe Collins is a black conservative, Navy veteran, and Republican from South Central Los Angeles, and he is running to to defeat radical leftist Maxine Waters. ---|--- Joe Collins For Congress 5777 W. Century Blvd STE#1110-143 Los Angeles, CA 90045 | | ---|---|--- Joe Collins is a veteran of the United States Navy. name: Lisa Scheller
subject: This election is that important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
You’re well aware, but this is the most important and consequential election we’ve seen thus far in our lifetime. This election is a simple choice. Peter, you’re well aware, but this is the most important and consequential election we’ve seen thus far in our lifetime.
This election is a simple choice. It’s a choice between people who seek to defend the rule of law and people who are willing to watch our cities burn to avoid confronting the radical, left-wing Democrats.
It’s a simple choice and yet my opponent, Susan Wild is on the wrong side. She isn’t just on the wrong side, she’s on the side of a dangerous ideology that, if it isn’t stopped in November, will quickly take hold in Lehigh Valley and in cities nationwide.
**[Peter, your support is critical to our success. Will you chip in right now to defend the rule of law in the Lehigh Valley?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=0172a347354d455c864abf1862ee7d71&_e=b86JG9Q2o0FQGnI5gfDAXmXaCqPfvPvaRanwcxvKZcyaB544iXG3X2dsi25CnVSLk-ObdFiT4EXlTYsUKjKMsq5sSNM-twjlstt0Nyb2spwiy8HQAvTYrABZYKgOwXTUhyT3OOQBKfTCNS1artqMq3izS2HQQS96A_wm1Ec8b4obZ4KpLv2-i7GJyqUnRtfs309ynh6XKn217bdTp72Anb6qc-35Pbe2Q9fFfZKveeFzngUdUj6xWjTCuTF1slFYc7DpyX6mAObJSlmTuS0Njg7jyyHLERvKeSlCpw0nn7_8yt-MKG_pilOi_Kbrw3fQ202VtlYTQr5eBJfRo-wjbJwoBxG7v330CNXd1tz83TwQe7G5JPJWmYzLIeK-KxO3gvBoxHp1FGlZ_ZG1aj5AspCw328U81iLjXEJ-4kuXyte7pThzBqgKvg8FgHr6MdA)**
I know we ask a lot of you, Peter, but if we lose this seat, chaos will become the “new normal” and run rampant in our streets. We cannot let this be our future -- there’s still time to stop this from happening. [**Help me defend the rule of law >>>**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=0172a347354d455c864abf1862ee7d71&_e=b86JG9Q2o0FQGnI5gfDAXmXaCqPfvPvaRanwcxvKZcyaB544iXG3X2dsi25CnVSLk-ObdFiT4EXlTYsUKjKMsq5sSNM-twjlstt0Nyb2spwiy8HQAvTYrABZYKgOwXTUhyT3OOQBKfTCNS1artqMq3izS2HQQS96A_wm1Ec8b4obZ4KpLv2-i7GJyqUnRtfs309ynh6XKn217bdTp72AnYpPRqdMq72ralOzQOaPFMmFZ9v_DFBpXkd6G59lzsyWihmc6zEbiuFGHEqrnCzbHSiIYgsNtb6TzINEkSP8vuDUWk4MS2T9hjvgtTIbFrvodjCF0gjdPnCbctiBvF4dKLvKrOAcCknOMHfFUkPY5VaJfsN2EIyImUJM2aEojNuER4srnRnr4z4Wmno06R6MPBNhqVylj6jSgiQ87YRmyHTMU-a6zlL_IjTt1WX_Frxs) Susan Wild is guaranteed to stand with Nancy Pelosi’s radical agenda, no matter how out of touch it is with reality, the Constitution, or even her own constituents.
You and I both know that Lehigh Valley won’t stand for this and has a proud history of standing with the rule of law and backing the men and women in BLUE.
**[That’s why I’m putting it on the line, Peter, to defend the rule of law and fight for our future. Peter, you’re well aware, but this is the most important and consequential election we’ve seen thus far in our lifetime. This election is a simple choice. It’s a choice between people who seek to defend the rule of law and people who are willing to watch our cities burn to avoid confronting the radical, left-wing Democrats. It’s a simple choice and yet my opponent, Susan Wild is on the wrong side. She isn’t just on the wrong side, she’s on the side of a dangerous ideology that, if it isn’t stopped in November, will quickly take hold in Lehigh Valley and in cities nationwide. I know we ask a lot of you, Peter, but if we lose this seat, chaos will become the “new normal” and run rampant in our streets. We cannot let this be our future -- there’s still time to stop this from happening. Susan Wild is guaranteed to stand with Nancy Pelosi’s radical agenda, no matter how out of touch it is with reality, the Constitution, or even her own constituents. You and I both know that Lehigh Valley won’t stand for this and has a proud history of standing with the rule of law and backing the men and women in BLUE. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

body:

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I want to share this note with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
I want to share the note I just sent our Calling Texas volunteers with
you. We broke some big records during our Monday phone bank for volunteer
participation which helped Texas break some really big records for voter
turnout during the first day of Early Voting.

It's clear that what we do today affects what is possible tomorrow.

Please, give this a read and then consider [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43827?source=ema20201014-108911&t=1001&akid=108911%2E444211%2E1j4CfN ]signing up to join me on
Thursday for a phone bank.

Thank you,

Beto

-----

Dear volunteer,

Over twelve hours on Monday we made 2,942,597 calls to Texas voters.

I don’t know that more calls have ever been made to more voters in a
single state over the course of just one day. And it couldn’t have
happened at a more critical moment.

Control of the State House, the size of our majority in Congress, and the
possibility of flipping the U.S. Senate all rest on the turnout in Texas.

And beyond that — if Texans vote in record numbers in this election, then
Joe Biden will become the first Democrat to win this state since 1976. Our
38 electoral college votes could end this national nightmare on election
night, without waiting for the slow returns or court battles that are our
fate if we don’t win Texas.

You made it more possible that we win all of these important elections
with the calls you made on Monday. And after the first full day of Early
Voting in Texas I think it’s safe to say that what we’re doing is working.
From Harris to El Paso, Texas counties have shattered their first-day
early vote records from previous elections.

Texans are showing up, and you helped make it happen.

Thank you for joining thousands of your fellow Americans in making these
calls and for ensuring our “Calling Texas: The Million Voter Phone Bank”
was a success (next time we will call it the “Three Million Voter Phone
Bank”).

Last thing — never ones to rest while there’s work to be done, we’d love
for you to join us for a phone bank I’m hosting this Thursday. Like the
calls we made Monday, these are easy — just asking people to vote during
early voting and helping to answer common voting questions. Most folks we
call to help make a plan to vote are glad we did, and for many these calls
make the difference between voting and not voting. If you’re interested,
you can sign up below:

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43827?source=ema20201014-108911&t=1002&akid=108911%2E444211%2E1j4CfN ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto and State House Candidates
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43828?source=ema20201014-108911&t=1003&akid=108911%2E444211%2E1j4CfN ]Thursday, October 15 at 5:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43828?source=ema20201014-108911&t=1004&akid=108911%2E444211%2E1j4CfN ]Get more info or RSVP » [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43829?source=ema20201014-108911&t=1005&akid=108911%2E444211%2E1j4CfN ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto and State House
Candidates
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43830?source=ema20201014-108911&t=1006&akid=108911%2E444211%2E1j4CfN ]Saturday, October 17 at 1:00pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43830?source=ema20201014-108911&t=1007&akid=108911%2E444211%2E1j4CfN ]Get more info or RSVP »

Thanks for coming through for Texas so that Texas can come through for the
country.

With deep gratitude,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43841?source=ema20201014-108911&t=1008&akid=108911%2E444211%2E1j4CfN ]Contribute »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=108911%2E444211%2E1j4CfN

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I'm really counting on you - especially today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We are in the final stretch of this campaign and Mitch McConnell is launching his final attacks against us. This FEC deadline is a good opportunity for us to show that nothing can stop us in the final
Hi there --
I have an important ask to make and I hope you'll give me a minute to explain why it is so important.
**Tonight is our final FEC fundraising deadline before Election Day. It 's the last big public report we will file and we need to make sure it reflects the strength of this people-powered campaign.**
So before the deadline we're hoping to report 250,000 contributions which will mean we are halfway to our October fundraising goal of 500,000 contributions.
Hitting this FEC deadline goal is so important, because Mitch McConnell will be watching to see if our fundraising slows before Election Day and we need to show that the support for this campaign is only growing stronger.
My team tells me we are closing in on the donations we need to hit our 250,000 contribution goal so we can go full speed ahead into the last half of the month. This is really important, so I'm coming directly to you:
[**If you are able, will you please split a $3 donation between our people-powered campaign and Senator Hassan's? We need to send a strong message with our final FEC report and your support will make all the difference.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc685/2a380d31/2092f44c/f04f1e/4289140726/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAxNF9NV0g0TUtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20201014_MWH4MK_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Dorothy McAuliffe
subject: Did you see Terry’s email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek, Did you see Terry’s email from yesterday? We’re making progress towards our $20,000 goal but we’re not where we need to be right now. With just over 24 hours to go, we have a massive $12,000 fundraising gap to close. **[Will you make a contribution before the deadline tomorrow night so that we can help Virginia Democrats win big in November?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkRkHmtLQQI5iSwMyf3fB4YsSiKwV_Th4OTTYoDWXzsq1xktho1UldqQqYlMVsnUgBcoT9avKIlc_sF0JHf1lCvylJTNmqeZxDZsR82Lzw_EaqPvDv9TtpWnvVxw2DQ__T42b-o9RbdznlaK58niEEfpfq5pXOzFbALqJsyeZ9dT8-mJr2JK9MyGr_BQbw6_iC7-0ElUaMst1ktB1n-EHChPgcg51sxs3jjD4eMv--e2Wng5NjSFmDI5ZkUi7YPY_HRFyQUZOU5CC8VPlD841ASB2W56dI1W4z5EGnsJNmflJ3M7oLB6_j06-sX4Lvbf9U/360/as8n7i1YRe-y4K0KgkSx1Q/h0/Vaq6OBRyTg1zvOZBKI62gGVfbGroV1wqthMYj-b2pgw)** There’s still time to have a big impact on this election. Dorothy
\---Forwarded message---
Derek, My team set a critical $20,000 goal to hit by Thursday, October 15th and I’m worried we might miss it. **The initial response to this critical goal was great -- and then donations slowed**** _way_****down.****[Please click here to rush a donation to help us close the gap.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkRkHmtLQQI5iSwMyf3fB4YsSiKwV_Th4OTTYoDWXzsq3xMGNe-SSrCLqhAaHgxgVKPJpsYezJys2MLoXG-byReJpUdrCI7Pbb-Mh8iN9cyEyL5oNrXNWCDhYBft2HuJMsBc8O3g3liWrB4Y0dsbo7x93Nhru71lzFOf2xr8VScAqYy9mAINz4hqC0pS3rJQPQVz7Vk1_9zKHzLnDGOIvJ49fiw_G6aSpV-2ciW2K7wDg8ZGe2CY3O5BO6Tix40f8JD_G5yE25w-g4HBLPAYPH-exM-pr57fDtyAzJN_poN2QE_sitIiYTEoGPGF6fx4oe/360/as8n7i1YRe-y4K0KgkSx1Q/h1/F1fKyiR8wJux9szvpX3-UQ_P2gKuGXelVod5bS6RrLo)****** You know as well as I do what’s at stake this year. The White House, Congress, and the Supreme Court are riding on what happens in the Commonwealth. That’s a big responsibility for Virginia Democrats. No doubt about it. But now’s not the time to slow down. With just three weeks to go, we’ve got to push as hard as we can. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: An concerning rise in case numbers
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We're seeing a concerning trend in our data. Our cases, hospitalizations, and deaths have all been slowly ticking up for the last couple weeks, and it's becoming clear that we're trending in the wrong direction. Our percent positive last week was 1.6%, the highest we'd seen it in seven weeks. Now it's even higher--well above 2%.
New hospitalizations last week also saw a big jump, up to 106 from the previous week's total of 67. We're still well below our maximum hospital capacity, but we know that once these numbers start to tick up, it doesn't take long before the increase becomes exponential. This same worrisome trend is reflected in our 'new cases' metric, which last week passed more than 100 per 100k.
I'm sure you have a lot of questions, so I want to try to answer the three questions you're probably asking: why are we seeing these numbers, what does it mean, and what can we do about it?
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nY6EykTTkQvjV0Bbczk0QCOXWfvNN-Oi_2qa422In9HPsq7mM3frAb7SX2jN8-3JHgoAGdI2n8QspPgEPa9iBSd1wjNZv699KNuPU0H12qIOcMzMVnLtjx_gbovGlTMOxZ_cchiszq-prHJHCPh2hckyvOFOOoOTXJgHHAbhNQdCVOQg89Aq9Ki9NwhrMqoH7Nkr8SozE1I=&c=qyVQ8DDh7Tp3rdQCpmiGwS_7DiMblg6VqXXb-eF1RXR6Rci0_rX6rg==&ch=yvIxubTqiv7x05zPGBbUIHPU6aq1slBWd3XnNOZyBhcGnJ295HboEA==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nY6EykTTkQvjV0Bbczk0QCOXWfvNN-Oi_2qa422In9HPsq7mM3frAb7SX2jN8-3JHgoAGdI2n8QspPgEPa9iBSd1wjNZv699KNuPU0H12qIOcMzMVnLtjx_gbovGlTMOxZ_cchiszq-prHJHCPh2hckyvOFOOoOTXJgHHAbhNQdCVOQg89Aq9Ki9NwhrMqoH7Nkr8SozE1I=&c=qyVQ8DDh7Tp3rdQCpmiGwS_7DiMblg6VqXXb-eF1RXR6Rci0_rX6rg==&ch=yvIxubTqiv7x05zPGBbUIHPU6aq1slBWd3XnNOZyBhcGnJ295HboEA==).
---
| It's important to note that we're not seeing the same types of outbreaks we saw early in this crisis. Below is a slide showing all positive cases in Rhode Island since September 8. The top line in black is all cases, and you can see it has an upward slope.
The bottom three lines in red, green, and magenta show cases among colleges and universities, PreK-12 students and staff, and congregate care residents. As you can see, all three of these lines are relatively flat, and in some cases even decreasing. The data is clear that this increase is not being driven - and in fact is being mitigated - by the cases in schools and congregate care settings. Controlled settings are not causing these cases.
In the middle of the graph you can see the blue line, which shows all cases minus controlled settings. That's the line that's most interesting. As you can see, that blue line has the steepest upward slope, comprising the bulk of our new cases.
So where are these cases coming from? Again, the data is incredibly clear.
---
|
---
| We're seeing an overwhelming pattern of cases coming from small gatherings of family and friends - people who are complying with our gathering limit, but are not wearing masks or socially distancing with those outside their immediate bubble.
This is how community transmission happens. We start to feel safe around a small group of people and we take off our mask, share food, or sit close to one another. But then the people in that group go off to their families and to their workplaces, and a few cases quickly becomes many. That's what we're seeing in Rhode Island. The good news is that it's not too late to stop this trend. If we all buckle down now and recommit to being serious about following the rules, we can turn our situation around before it gets out of control.
So today, I have one ask of every Rhode Islander. Any time you are outside your household, wear your mask and keep your distance.
It doesn't matter if you're at your best friend's house with only a handful of people or at coffee with two friends after church. Even if you're only with family--if they're not the people you live with, wear a mask and keep your distance. That's especially true when you're with older friends and relatives.
This is hard. I put on my mask every time I see my mom, and I wish I didn't have to. But I know it's the only way to keep her safe. When you're with loved ones in a small, intimate setting, it's easy to feel safe and let your guard down. I understand that. But we all need to resist that temptation. Please, recommit to putting on your mask and keeping your distance everywhere you go.
Together, we can turn the trend around and get ahead of the virus. In that spirit, I'm holding another press conference tomorrow at 1p.m. to announce some new targeted, data-driven steps we're taking to stop the spread of the virus.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nY6EykTTkQvjV0Bbczk0QCOXWfvNN-Oi_2qa422In9HPsq7mM3frAcTFIfu2yMhnZxmViH-Ct9FRxhUEWwuEpoLsH6uOSGQEWveAbSfa3oCTsEsHoPFxY1_gHcHcq0MXEsPiAGj6x9hljK6yTIoyzMk-3bPpp_zZLTY2LV3-86MuzCSV9m2Th55kuktcXobVKuQVdsPt3WTX1E5BhPAup8MBqa9dc_fyEaYdo982w0Y0VEny73QUqEOg0Aul2t0zkOcQlMFFImbKZy-X3asfHYvAKNFvFHsxnhY7oyZu3zkG9DDHwUxZxv8pnbiKU9KrHsE0vF0lpzA=&c=qyVQ8DDh7Tp3rdQCpmiGwS_7DiMblg6VqXXb-eF1RXR6Rci0_rX6rg==&ch=yvIxubTqiv7x05zPGBbUIHPU6aq1slBWd3XnNOZyBhcGnJ295HboEA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903

name: Team Warner
subject: We've just passed a huge milestone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
More than a million Virginians have already voted. Make your plan to vote!
|
---

| | Derek --

We just passed a huge milestone -- **_more than a million votes have been cast in Virginia!_**

Virginians are already turning out in record numbers to cast their ballots in this election. Whether you're planning to vote early by mailing in a no-excuse absentee ballot, to vote early in-person, or to vote in-person on Election Day on November 3rd, it's so important that you make your voice heard this year.

**Derek, it 's not too late to get in on the early voting action. Due to an outage on the Virginia Department of Elections' website yesterday, the deadline to register has now been extended to 11:59pm on Thursday, October 15.** Even if you're pretty sure that you're registered, it doesn't hurt to check again to guarantee that your voice is heard in this election. Head over to **[iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da5e/53d9897e/55595ce3/1c88f74c/3179078245/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/")** to make sure that you're registered and make your plan to vote.

There's so much on the line in this election. We have the power to elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Mark Warner, and Democrats down the ballot. But to do that we're going to need to match the record turnout we saw on Super Tuesday.

Make sure you make your plan to vote, and if you've already cast your ballot, thank you!

Let's get out there and win!

-- Team Warner

P.S. If you're looking for a way to support other Virginia voters, **[consider contributing as we kick our voter turnout efforts into high gear in these last few weeks before the election.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da5e/53d9897e/55595ce3/1c88f74b/3179078245/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-millionvotes?refcode=20201014_e_1_d__880__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da5e/53d9897e/55595ce3/1c88f74b/3179078245/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-millionvotes?refcode=20201014_e_1_d__880__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da5e/53d9897e/55595ce3/1c88f74a/3179078245/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: President Trump takes questions on the economic recovery
body:
During President Trump’s first three years in office, incomes for the average American family grew by $6,000... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8a7695aaab&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 14, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH: President Trump takes questions on the economic recovery**

**During President Trump’s** first three years in office, incomes for the average American family grew by $6,000–more than five times the gains seen during the entire Obama Administration.

**Then 9 months ago,** the Coronavirus plague spread across the world. Despite gloomy predictions that the U.S. economy would see double-digit unemployment far into the future, America has witnessed its fastest recovery in history under President Trump.

**“Under the previous administration** , it took 30 months to recover more than half the jobs lost in the crisis,” President Trump told the Economic Clubs of New York; Florida; Washington, D.C.; Chicago; Pittsburgh; and Sheboygan, Wisconsin, this morning in a virtual address from the Rose Garden.

**“We surpassed that** milestone in fewer than 5 months.”

**During his remarks** and a subsequent Q&A session, the President talked about the fast economic recovery, his Administration’s massive Coronavirus response, and the strategy to protect vulnerable Americans while safely reopening our country for the young and healthy:
* [**Trust the American people**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4fe1edc59c&e=3ee4985eea): “Americans should be trusted with the facts, the data, and the truth. For the young and healthy, the risk is exceedingly low—99.98 percent of those under the age of 50 survive . . . That’s why we’re so focused on protecting elderly and higher-risk Americans.”

* [**End mass lockdowns**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6726ec9775&e=3ee4985eea): “The unscientific lockdowns pushed by leftwing politicians are needlessly destroying millions of lives”—through suicides, delayed healthcare, and more. “The cure cannot be worse than the problem itself.”

* [**Keep up historic action**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6dc0fb6361&e=3ee4985eea): The Trump Administration has sent over 160 million stimulus checks, provided over $650 billion in forgivable loans to American small businesses, protected 50 million jobs, increased unemployment benefits, froze student loan payments, stopped evictions, and suspended payroll taxes.

* [**Help the working class**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ecfbaf1b09&e=3ee4985eea): “My policies have benefited those who need it the most. The bottom 50 percent of households saw an astonishing 40 percent increase in net worth. Wages rose the fastest for blue-collar workers.”

* [**Come back stronger than ever**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9caebf11c&e=3ee4985eea): “We will continue our V-shaped recovery and launch a record-smashing economic boom. We will end the pandemic with a safe and effective vaccine [and] create 10 million jobs in the first 10 months of 2021.”

**No one predicted** the kind of Great American Comeback that President Trump has led—both during his first three years in office _and_ following the worldwide Coronavirus outbreak earlier this year. “At the end of the last administration, the Congressional Budget Office projected fewer than 2 million jobs would be created in 3 years,” he said.

**Instead, the Trump Economy** created 7 million of them.

**Now, America is rapidly** recovering from the pandemic with 11.4 million jobs created since May. To continue that historic boom, President Trump is ensuring that medical and pharmaceutical supply chains are reshored, that Federal contracts are stripped from companies that outsource jobs, and that American healthcare is protected—including Medicare and insurance for patients with preexisting conditions.

**“We are lifting up citizens** of every race, color, religion, and creed,” President Trump said today. “We are delivering a future of fairness, justice, and dignity. We are defending our values, our principles, and our way of life.”

**🎬** [**President Trump: “The best is yet to come!”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a3eb00e32&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** [**WATCH President Trump’s full address**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5bc946470f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **Marine One carrying President Donald J. Trump lifts off from the South Lawn** | October 14, 2020
---
|

---

---

name: Team Cotton
subject: Day of Action this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
We are less than 20 days away from Election Day and the Cotton for Senate Campaign is partnering with the Arkansas Young Republicans as they fight to keep Arkansas Red! We need your help to ensure conservative voters get to the polls to fight the radical left-wing agenda. Come out and join us on the last Saturday before early voting for our statewide Day of Action! The Arkansas Young Republicans have three locations that will be providing snacks and meals to all our volunteers as we help Republicans get elected or keep their seats in key areas across the state! http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2ODI5MzgS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MTE5NTE0NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

We are less than 20 days away from Election Day and the Cotton for Senate Campaign is partnering with the Arkansas Young Republicans as they fight to keep Arkansas Red! We need your help to ensure conservative voters get to the polls to fight the radical left-wing agenda.

Come out and join us on the last Saturday before early voting for our statewide Day of Action! The Arkansas Young Republicans have three locations that will be providing snacks and meals to all our volunteers as we help Republicans get elected or keep their seats in key areas across the state!

Central Arkansas 9:30 AM
Contact: Laneigh Pfalser (501) 743-5035
Location: French Hill for AR Headquarters

NWA 9:30 AM
Contact: Joseph Bollinger (479) 531-0788
Location: NWA GOP Victory Office

SEARK 8 AM
Contact: Senator Trent Garner (870) 818-9219
Location: Union County GOP Victory Office

We also have a Facebook event that you can respond to and share with your friends!

Let me be clear - polls are looking critical this year and Republicans CANNOT rest on our laurels and expect victory on election night. Doors and phones are proven methods to convert voters and you are absolutely needed. So even if you can only donate a couple hours time on Saturday, that will still be a critical help!

To volunteer or for more information, please contact ARYR State Chair, Laneigh Pfalser at info@arkansasyr.gop

Vanessa Moody
Cotton for Senate Campaign Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

---
You’re my only hope.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Secretary=20of=20Agriculture=20Mike=20Naig?=
subject: We need a friend of agriculture in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| As someone that wants to see Iowa agriculture thrive, I’m writing to put in a word for my friend, Senator Randy Feenstra.
---
| [Support Randy Here!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=af77809126&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Support Randy Here!")
---
| I’ve known Randy for years, and in that time, I’ve seen him work tirelessly in the Iowa Senate to strengthen our state. Randy understands that agriculture is the backbone of Iowa, and in order for the state to succeed, our farmers need to succeed.

In the Senate, Randy passed legislation to make it happen. He eliminated the grain bin tax, provided support for first-time farmers just getting started, and worked across the aisle to support Iowa ethanol. This record of results is why he’s endorsed by the Iowa Corn Growers Association and the Iowa Farm Bureau – he gets things done.

We need someone as effective as Randy in Congress to get things done and deliver for Iowa agriculture. Consider lending him your support by chipping in $1, $5, or $10 by clicking on the button below, and make sure you get out and vote on November 3rd!
---
| [Click Here to Chip in $5](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=0d6de5cc2c&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click Here to Chip in $5")
---
| Sincerely,

Secretary of Agriculture Mike Naig
---
|
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
| Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323
[Add us to your address book](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8&e=d48ad6f8f4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8&e=d48ad6f8f4&c=cf54893f78).

Be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=9bf854ddda&e=d48ad6f8f4), [Twitter](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=c2bae99616&e=d48ad6f8f4), and [Instagram](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=ca9eda4d2e&e=d48ad6f8f4). name: Roger Stone
subject: Just checking in, Patriot
body:
Laura Loomer's team is tallying up the final donations before midnight’s final FEC fundraising deadline, and **I noticed your name wasn’t on the list**.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397485-935918-5243436-3621294cb3-12f58f4136)

Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397485-935918-5243436-3621294cb3-12f58f4136) Roger Stone here.

Laura Loomer's team is tallying up the final donations before midnight’s final FEC fundraising deadline, and **I noticed your name wasn’t on the list**.

[**If you’re ready to help Laura fight, please pitch in $10, $25, or even $50 to help us reach our $230,000 goal before midnight tonight.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397485-935918-5243436-3621294cb3-12f58f4136)

Already, supporters like you have come through for a massive $215,397 of our $230,000 goal.

But we need the full $230,000 if we’re going to hit every item on our final budget... and if we’re going to make sure Laura wins this race on November 3.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Today’s COVID-19 update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Indiana has launched a county-by-county, color-coded map on its COVID-19 Dashboard, and you can check daily on how things are going in your community. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Hoosiers,

You are not alone. We are all ready to put COVID-19 behind us.

Governor Holcomb is with us, too. But, as Governor Holcomb reminded us yesterday, the data and science show that we are not over COVID-19 yet – in Indiana, or anywhere else.

**This is why Indiana will remain in Stage 5 of the Back on Track Plan, our current managed stage of this public health crisis.**

Indiana has launched a county-by-county, color-coded map on its **[COVID-19 Dashboard](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d51bad9f66494542966db86f054a09cb&_e=OloyGyJLh2P7sutsLwG4gpvjFIV0TSD6Yw3hKHefo8kzXLMW37rIFZnv1wznh-zX-FNoPQCdLljBJkSGdjJEBRzn9vOeEn_ASxkm5tLb09XOmTaSSSotSC1F8Q4IlAr5oUcLXXssDuO7MFiTBtWDoxAKtT31kViIdWQCd_3JJSUvFNU2DlnArZBlZAfQ4nXkcGB_4HBd6wf0Uy-5FfZ88cvsLtnzPzISjNT8miKtD4ZeZw3nE-5zYNeFtT_vqy2NqLQ96PrpHPiMAzViP6bwNiKjcj-OlDOB6bXPCpj1zqeACVwb66xLOngzDU_xQWpPBR9fDyZBVwtkzvsuJ-zh50l-A4T5nPVOHdbBDB35GyBJ1auxv31DeClIbWHQyrCfCZGg3LCX6rH1G10KeoQZAytgDtXRMOSrCr3vCRG1Y-hcAXWO8vWrYIuuCbkRlOCQ1NsioIRvXZl3iADNRs97Dw%3D%3D)** , and you can check daily on how things are going in your community. Each color comes with recommendations on organizing gatherings and how we can all continue to fight the spread.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d51bad9f66494542966db86f054a09cb&_e=OloyGyJLh2P7sutsLwG4gpvjFIV0TSD6Yw3hKHefo8kzXLMW37rIFZnv1wznh-zX-FNoPQCdLljBJkSGdjJEBRzn9vOeEn_ASxkm5tLb09XOmTaSSSotSC1F8Q4IlAr5oUcLXXssDuO7MFiTBtWDoxAKtT31kViIdWQCd_3JJSUvFNU2DlnArZBlZAfQ4nXkcGB_4HBd6wf0Uy-5FfZ88cvsLtnzPzISjNT8miKtD4ZeZw3nE-5zYNeFtT_vqy2NdT85kRgYcjaBfYrXvgOVHqxkCHa3q5tSetuxMWlq3q6FJ3Pm5dBFPamMzrvxZSXzYzwAUWqBO_K4v2rEKx4B9wD4yiuRpXxLuZLUvo8MY4oyLPTOxmu1HFA5BGqziZA0RMjQqcmYejoh9ag6hy_MMc5xaGoamQY8hONRm5w5hdaNCHqBQrI0w8jhkZzYwya6C7jHQZ854bXnvGpoWGbJDA%3D%3D)
[**COVID-19 DASHBOARD: Check Your County’s Numbers Now**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d51bad9f66494542966db86f054a09cb&_e=OloyGyJLh2P7sutsLwG4gpvjFIV0TSD6Yw3hKHefo8kzXLMW37rIFZnv1wznh-zX-FNoPQCdLljBJkSGdjJEBRzn9vOeEn_ASxkm5tLb09XOmTaSSSotSC1F8Q4IlAr5oUcLXXssDuO7MFiTBtWDoxAKtT31kViIdWQCd_3JJSUvFNU2DlnArZBlZAfQ4nXkcGB_4HBd6wf0Uy-5FfZ88cvsLtnzPzISjNT8miKtD4ZeZw3nE-5zYNeFtT_vqy2NUyXrlf0HsVEAJGAbkk3UZoJkgDMmFjS5wbGmmP0JWmgwIatDDkO_-kkNEdK_L-eAPnFh-r1oXQf4IV5VYiL7YG5kc9r1E4nY7nfzjrstnBGS61wA08axtVf3Tjw5rF3x2VtMcvUdPjplYlA4k5n48X0ee-gVhnx310gsMLrxeQmFdoXG0tYJ-3R6gYGkYoLEs6wvlH6BLyBFStob64cYfQ%3D%3D)
Our state’s current mask requirement has also been extended.

**Governor Holcomb said it perfectly today: “In my mind, wearing a mask is a layup.”**

That’s because, as more Hoosiers are returning back to work, back to school, and back to their routines, it’s the simplest actions we can all take to keep us and our fellow Hoosiers healthy.

It’s how we show our Hoosier Hospitality.

So Hoosiers, let’s take the easiest shot together. Wear your mask, wash your hands, stay home if you’re sick, and keep your distance (6 feet, that is).

#BackOnTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Get in the game 🌿
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2a6c8e9bdcd9/get-in-the-game?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | When I was in third grade, I wrote an essay for a state essay contest about the environment. I won and got my first taste of the value of having a platform - my first taste of activism.

Now, my daughter is the same age I was then, and she and her brother both know how important it is to be good stewards of this planet. They can point out constellations and stars, know when a garden tomato is ripe, that we let spiders outside, and that the earth - this precious planet - is at real risk.

We have known for decades how grave the risk was, and we have failed to take the kind of broad, sweeping action we need to address it. [Now is the time.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=cee73a9536&e=140a9b81e7)

I’m not just fighting for my kids. I’m fighting for yours, and for all the kids growing up in Flint, Michigan, and Utica, Illinois who don’t have clean drinking water. For the kids in LaSalle whose playgrounds sit on EPA Superfund sites. For the farm kids and the city kids in IL-16, whose futures are being throttled by continued inaction by administrations too scared to do a damned thing.

We need our leaders to get in the game, and I didn’t come to play. I came to win. Our kids need us.

**[Help me get there.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=549a3d83d0&e=140a9b81e7)**

Dani
---
| | | | | | | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6d1fab2f23&e=140a9b81e7)
---

They can point out constellations and stars, know when a garden tomato is ripe, that we let spiders outside, and that the earth - this precious planet - is at real risk. We have known for decades how grave the risk was, and we have failed to take the kind of broad, sweeping action we need to address it. I’m not just fighting for my kids. I’m fighting for yours, and for all the kids growing up in Flint, Michigan, and Utica, Illinois who don’t have clean drinking water. For the kids in LaSalle whose playgrounds sit on EPA Superfund sites. For the farm kids and the city kids in IL-16, whose futures are being throttled by continued inaction by administrations too scared to do a damned thing. We need our leaders to get in the game, and I didn’t come to play. I came to win. Our kids need us. Dani | | | | | | | | | | | www.daniforillinois.com | | Copyright © 2020 Dani for Illinois, All rights reserved.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Three under-the-radar Senate races where your donation would go a long way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
I'd like to talk about three Democratic women I've endorsed who are running uphill races to flip Republican-held seats in the U.S. Senate: Marquita Bradshaw in Tennessee, Abby Broyles in my home state | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e9/45c30650/1c6bee153/66e889cb/2830368188/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Back when I was first thinking about running for the U.S. Senate, a lot of people told me that I didn't have a chance.

The Republican incumbent was popular and well-funded, and a woman had never won as Senator or Governor in Massachusetts before.

But I decided that even if I didn't win, it was still important to get in the fight -- because every day I spent on the campaign trail could still make a difference.

I could talk about how the middle class was under attack. I could get a bunch of grassroots volunteers together who'd stay in the fight long after Election Day. And every time I met a young girl on the trail, I could tell her that I was running for Senate because _that's what girls do._

We ran uphill. We built a grassroots movement that's still in the fight. And we won that race.

So today, **I'd like to talk about three Democratic women I've endorsed who are running uphill races to flip Republican-held seats in the U.S. Senate: Marquita Bradshaw in Tennessee, Abby Broyles in my home state of Oklahoma, and Dr. Merav Ben-David in Wyoming.**

They're running strong grassroots campaigns, mobilizing new networks of volunteers in a way that will make lasting change, and fighting from the heart for the bold reforms we need as a country.

These races haven't been in the national spotlight -- so a little investment can go a long way to help expand the map for Democrats to take back the Senate, especially in these critical final weeks.

**[If you can, will you split a contribution of $2 or whatever makes sense between Marquita Bradshaw, Abby Broyles, Dr. Merav Ben-David, and Warren Democrats? Your donation will help take back the Senate and help elect champions for working people across the country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e9/45c30650/1c6bee153/66e889ca/2830368188/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW1iLWFiLW1iZCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMDZGX0VHUl9FTkRfRV8yMDIwMTAxNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-mb-ab-mbd?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW06F_EGR_END_E_20201014_V1S1_P")**

These three women are terrific candidates -- and they'd make outstanding senators.

Dr. Merav Ben-David is an accomplished scientist, a brilliant teacher, and a fearless leader who will make Wyoming proud. As the danger of dismissing science becomes clearer and clearer each day, her experience and expertise will be an enormous asset in the Senate. That's why I'm proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with her in this fight.

Marquita Bradshaw is a lifelong community organizer and environmental justice advocate who understands the importance of people-powered politics and giving hard-working people a voice in Washington. During this time of crisis, the people of Tennessee deserve a leader like her who believes in science, facts, decency, and the urgent need to advance racial justice.

Abby Broyles and I have quite a bit in common. We are both born-and-raised Oklahoma women who put ourselves through law school and have fought for transparency. I know she'll carry that same determination and grit into the United States Senate where she'll stand up for what's right by fighting for health care -- because when a rural hospital closes or coverage for pre-existing conditions is threatened, the health care of all Oklahomans is at risk. She'll work across the aisle to get the job done for all Oklahomans.

Here's the way I see it, when I think about races like these: as Democrats, we don't get anywhere by only taking on fights that we know we're going to win. We take on tough fights because that is a measure of who we are. And with polls showing tight races in some unexpected places in 2020 -- like South Carolina, Mississippi, and Texas -- everything is on the table. But we don't get what we don't fight for.

**By investing in these grassroots campaigns, you can help power the type of person-to-person organizing that makes long-term change possible across the country.**

**[Please chip in if you can to support Marquita Bradshaw, Abby Broyles, Dr. Merav Ben-David, and Warren Democrats.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e9/45c30650/1c6bee153/66e889ca/2830368188/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW1iLWFiLW1iZCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMDZGX0VHUl9FTkRfRV8yMDIwMTAxNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-mb-ab-mbd?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW06F_EGR_END_E_20201014_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e9/45c30650/1c6bee153/66e889ca/2830368188/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW1iLWFiLW1iZCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMDZGX0VHUl9FTkRfRV8yMDIwMTAxNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-mb-ab-mbd?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW06F_EGR_END_E_20201014_V1S1_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e9/45c30650/1c6bee153/66e88821/2830368188/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e9/45c30650/1c6bee153/66e88820/2830368188/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e9/45c30650/1c6bee153/66e88823/2830368188/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e9/45c30650/1c6bee153/66e88822/2830368188/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e9/45c30650/1c6bee153/66e88825/2830368188/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e9/45c30650/1c6bee153/66e88824/2830368188/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")
